# Rockwell Automation Website
> Curated sitemap content for LLM optimization.

This file provides curated sections of the Rockwell Automation website. Each section groups related pages for LLM inference and optimization.

## Rockwell Automation Homepage

- [Smart Manufacturing Industrial Automation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us.html) : We connect the imaginations of people with the potential of technology to expand what is humanly possible, making the world more productive and sustainable.

## Learn about the industries the Rockwell Automation serves.

- [Industries We Serve](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/industries.html) : Proven, repeatable, scalable solutions designed to meet your unique needs

- [Capabilities](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/capabilities.html) : Enhance your plant's efficiency with tailored industrial automation solutions. Access expert insights and flexible options to boost performance. Explore now.

## Experience Rockwell Automation in-person, virtual, and hybrid events.

- [Events](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/events.html) : Take advantage of the upcoming events to learn more about how you can use technology as a competitive advantage.

## Explore Rockwell Automation's new hardware, software, technologies, solutions and services.

- [Product Offerings](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products.html) : Improve productivity at every stage of the automation lifecycle.

- [Water and Wastewater Treatment Solutions](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/industries/water-wastewater.html) : Water industry professionals face many challenges. Learn more about our water automation technologies, delivering best-in-class process control solutions.

- [Mass Transit Automation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/industries/mass-transit.html) : Explore how transit automation enhances safety, efficiency, and rider satisfaction with smart technologies and interconnected systems for public transport.

- [Renewable Energy](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/industries/renewable-energy.html) : From solar to wind, Rockwell Automation has the products, services, and global support to deliver a complete portfolio of renewable energy solutions.

- [Signal Interface](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/signal-interface.html) : Our signal interface products provide signal conversion and electrical isolation between sensors and other field devices and a control circuit.

## Circuit and Load ProtectionAllen-Bradley Catalog

- [140MT MPCB](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/140mt-mpcb.html) : Our Bulletin 140MT Motor Protection Circuit Breakers (MPCBs) provide cost-saving magnetic short-circuit and thermal overload protection up to 40A.

- [140G Circuit Breakers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/140g-circuit-breakers.html) : Our Bulletin 140G Molded Case Circuit Breakers have nine different frame sizes with a range of 10...3000 A.

- [140G Through the Door Rotary Operator](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/140g-through-door-rotary-operator.html) : Simplified panel assembly and operation allows you to control the protected circuit breaker and retain functionality whether the panel door is open or closed.

- [1489-M Thermal-magnetic Circuit Breakers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1489-m.html) : These circuit breakers are ideal for extreme ambient conditions, feature fast breaking time, and superior shock and vibration resistance.

- [188-J Regional Circuit Breakers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/188-j.html) : These circuit breakers  feature fast breaking time, superior shock and vibration resistance.

- [1492-MC Thermo-magnetic Circuit Breakers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1492-mc-thermo-magnetic-circuit-breakers.html) : These circuit breakers combine thermal and magnetic trip actions and provide accurate overload and short-circuit protection for conductors and connected equipment.

- [1492-SPM Supplementary Protectors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1492-spm.html) : These supplementary protectors are are current-limiting and feature dual terminals for wiring and bus bar flexibility.

- [1492-RCDA Residual Current Devices](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1492-rcda.html) : These devices detect and interrupt leakage to the ground, helping you prevent injury to exposed personnel and damage to equipment.

- [1492-GH High-density Circuit Breakers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1492-gh-high-density-circuit-breakers.html) : These circuit breakers incorporate a thermal portion and a magnetic trip function for the combined advantages of two sensing systems.

- [1492-D DC High Voltage Miniature Circuit Breakers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1492-d-dc-high-voltage.html) : These circuit breakers provide overcurrent and short circuit protection for higher voltage DC circuits and feature dual terminals and are multi-wire rated for up to four wires.

- [140UT MCCB](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/140ut-mccb.html) : These are current-limiting circuit breaker that provide fixed short-circuit and overcurrent protection, offer high interrupting ratings for 2- and 3-pole devices, and are suitable for back feeding at 240V and 480Y/277V.

- [140MT MCP](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/140mt-mcp.html) : Our Bulletin 140MT Motor Circuit Protectors (D9N version), rated up to 40A, can be applied in combination with Contactors and Overload relays.

- [140MG MCP](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/140mg-mcp.html) : These devices provide a disconnecting means for motor branch circuit, branch-circuit and short-circuit magnetic protection, and manual switching. These devices are rated from 3...1200 A.

- [140MP MPCB](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/140mp-mpcb.html) : Our Bulletin 140MP motor protection circuit breakers provide magnetic short-circuit and thermal overload protection up to 32 A, with an interrupting rating @400V of up to 100 kA.

- [140MG MPCB](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/140mg-mpcb.html) : These circuit breakers can provide a disconnecting means for motor branch circuit, branch-circuit and short-circuit magnetic protection, overload thermal protection, and manual switching.

- [194R Fused and Non-fused](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/194r-fused-and-non-fused.html) : These switches offer fused and non-fused versions from 20...1250 A and can be ordered with or without an enclosure.

- [194U Non-fused Rotary Disconnect Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/194u-non-fused.html) : These switches are available in non-fused versions from 30...160 A that permit the use of your own fuse blocks.

- [1494G Hazardous Location](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1494g-hazardous-location.html) : Our Bulletin 1494G Hazardous Location Safety Disconnect Switches can be used for 30 A, 60 A and 100 A applications.

- [1494G Heavy Industrial Safety Disconnect Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1494g-heavy-industrial.html) : Our Bulletin 1494G Heavy Industrial Safety Disconnect Switches offer 30…600 A switch ratings. They are available in Type 3R/4/12 painted metal, Type 4/4X stainless steel and Type 4/4X non-metallic enclosures.

- [1494H Industrial](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1494h-industrial.html) : Our Bulletin 1494H Industrial and Bulletin 1494HL General Duty Safety Disconnect Switches are designed for industrial and heavy commercial applications and can also be used in “at motor” disconnect switch applications.

- [1494U Universal](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1494u-universal.html) : Our Bulletin 1494U Universal Disconnect Switches provide the extra level of visual ON or OFF indication of a knife-blade disconnect design.

- [1491 Fuse Blocks](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1491-fuse-blocks.html) : Our Bulletin 1491 Fuse Blocks are designed for general purpose applications. The bases of these blocks, either phenolic or porcelain, are rugged in construction and provide ease in mounting and wiring.

- [1692 Block-style Electronic Circuit Protection](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1692-electronic-circuit-protection.html) : Our Bulletin 1692 Electronic Circuit Protection Modules protect the secondary circuits of 24V DC switched mode power supplies.

- [1694 Modular Electronic Circuit Protectors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1694-electronic-circuit-protection.html) : Our modular Bulletin 1694 Electronic Circuit Protectors protect the secondary circuits of 24V DC switch mode power supply against short circuit or overload. IO-Link enabled versions provide real-time insight into the status of your control system.

- [140F Fuse Holders](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/140f-fuse-holders.html) : Bulletin 140F Fuse Holders are available for UL Class CC or Midget Fuses and IEC 10 x 38 mm fuses, with or without blown fuse indication.

- [1492-FB Fuse Holders](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/1492-fb-fuse-holders.html) : Our fuse holders give you a safe and convenient means for installation of class CC, J, and midget fuses.

- [193 IEC E300 Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/193-iec-e300-relays.html) : Our Bulletin 193/592 E300™ (networked) and E200™ (non-networked) offer a modular design, communication options, diagnostic information, simplified wiring, and integration into Logix technology.

- [193 IEC E100 Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/193-iec-e100-relays.html) : Our E100 Electronic Overload Relays are the next generation basic-tier electronic overload relay. These relays include enhanced features to better safeguard your motor protection investments.

- [193 IEC E1 Plus Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/193-iec-e1-plus-relays.html) : Our Bulletin 193 IEC and 592 NEMA E1 Plus Electronic Overload Relays are discontinued and no longer available for sale. To support your transition, customers are encouraged to migrate to our E100 Electronic Overload Relays.

- [193-T1 CT IEC Bimetallic Standard](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/193-t1-ct-iec-bimetallic-standard.html) : Our Bulletin 193-T1 IEC Bimetallic Overload Relays are designed for use with Bulletin 100-C Contactors and Bulletin 104-C Reversing Contactors.

- [193-K IEC Bimetallic Miniature](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/193-k-iec-bimetallic-miniature.html) : Our Bulletin 193-K IEC Miniature Bimetallic Overload Relays are designed for use with Bulletin 100-K Contactors and Bulletin 104-K Reversing Contactors. These thermal overload relays include a differential mechanism for sensitivity to phase-loss conditions.

- [592 NEMA Eutectic Alloy](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/592-nema-eutectic-alloy.html) : Bulletin 592 Eutectic Alloy Overload Relays are thermal type devices.

- [809S Current Monitoring](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/809s-current-monitoring.html) : Our Bulletin 809S Current Monitoring Relays provides under- and over-current detection and supplementary protective functions that are easily added and applied to your motor control circuits.

- [813S Voltage Monitoring](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/813s-voltage-monitoring.html) : Our Bulletin 813S Voltage Monitoring Relays offer state-of-the-art supplementary protective functions that you can easily add and apply to your motor control circuits.

- [814S Power Monitoring](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/814s-power-monitoring.html) : Our Bulletin 814S Power Factor Monitoring Relays and Power (kW) Monitoring Relays offer state-of-the-art supplementary protective functions that you can easily add and apply to your motor control circuits.

- [817S Thermistor Monitoring](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/817s-thermistor-monitoring.html) : Our Bulletin 817S Thermistor Monitoring Relays protects equipment from over-temperature conditions and offers supplementary motor protective functions that you can easily add and apply to your motor control circuits.

- [4983-DC Surge Protector And Filters](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/4983-dc-surge-protector-and-filters.html) : Bulletin 4983-DC DIN Rail Filter and Surge Protective Device is the combination of a filter and a surge protective device. This device provides transient and noise protection in one small package.

- [4983-PF Panel Mount Filters](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/4983-pf-panel-mount-filters.html) : Our Bulletin 4983-PF Panel Mount Filters provide noise protection.

- [4983-DS Surge Protectors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/4983-ds-surge-protectors.html) : Our Bulletin 4983-DS DIN Rail AC Surge Protective Devices are connected in parallel and use an MOV to clamp high-voltage surges.

- [4983-DH Heavy Duty Surge Protectors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/4983-dh-heavy-duty-surge-protectors.html) : Bulletin 4983-DH Heavy-Duty AC Surge Protector combines a high-energy varistor (MOV) network with a gas discharge tube to better protection level, life duration, and leakage control.

- [4983-DD Dataline Surge Protectors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/4983-dd-dataline-surge-protectors.html) : Our Bulletin 4983-DD DIN Rail Dataline Surge Protective Devices protect industrial communication networks.

- [194E Load Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/194e-load-switches.html) : Our Bulletin 194E Load Switches are designed for use as local motor isolation and disconnect switch applications.

- [194L Control and Load Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/circuit-and-load-protection/194l-control-and-load-switches.html) : Our Bulletin 194L Control and Load Switches are flexible, adaptable, time- and space-saving devices.

We recommend you migrate to our Bulletin 140UT Molded Case Circuit Breakers.

We recommend you migrate to our Bulletin 140MT Motor Circuit Protectors.

We recommend that you migrate to our Bulletin 140MT Motor Protection Circuit Breakers.

We have tools to help you transition to more modern technologies.

## Condition MonitoringAllen-Bradley Catalog

- [1444 Dynamix](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/condition-monitoring/1444-dynamix.html) : Our Dynamix™ 1444 Integrated Condition Monitoring system helps you monitor and protect the machines in your Integrated Architecture.

- [9309 Emonitor Software](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/condition-monitoring/9309-emonitor-software.html) : Our Bulletin 9309 Emonitor® Condition Monitoring Software works with our monitors and portable data collectors to help establish and execute a condition-based predictive maintenance program.

- [1442 Series](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/condition-monitoring/1442-series.html) : Our Bulletin 1442 Eddy Current Probe Systems include a linear range of 0.25...29 mm (9.8...1142 mils). These systems are suited for shaft vibration, phase/speed reference, and rotor/thrust position measurements on industrial machinery.

- [1443 Series Accelerometers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/condition-monitoring/1443-series-accelerometers.html) : Our Bulletin 1443 Series Accelerometer sensors are used to measure vibration on industrial machinery.

- [1441 Dynamix 2500](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/condition-monitoring/1441-dynamix-2500.html) : Our Bulletin 1441 Dynamix™ 2500 portable data collectors can measure, process, display, and store a variety of analysis functions.

- [1440 XM-124](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/condition-monitoring/1440-xm-124.html) : Our Bulletin 1440 XM® 124 Standard Dynamic Measurement Modules monitor shaft, casing, or pedestal vibration in rotating equipment.

- [1440 XM ControlNet](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/condition-monitoring/1440-xm-controlnet.html) : Our Bulletin 1440 XM® Dynamic Measurement Modules for ControlNet™ networks monitor vibration, pressure, and strain on rotating equipment.

- [1440 XM-220](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/condition-monitoring/1440-xm-220.html) : Our Bulletin 1440 XM® 220 Dual Speed Modules operate in dual-channel, single redundant channel, or reverse rotation mode to control how sensors calculate the speed, acceleration, and peak measurements.

- [1440 XM-442](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/condition-monitoring/1440-xm-442.html) : Our Bulletin 1440 XM® 441 and 442 Relay Modules provide relay solutions when additional relays, more than the single onboard relays of our measurement modules, are required.

## Connection DevicesAllen-Bradley Catalog

- [1492 ClearMark Advanced](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-clearmark-advanced-II.html) : Our Bulletin 1492 ClearMark™ advanced marking system prints on terminal block marker cards as well as other industrial components.

- [1492 ClearMultiprint Marking System](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-clearmultiprint.html) : Our Bulletin 1492 ClearMultiprint™ marking system marks terminal block tags, heat shrink, self-laminating wire, and adhesive labels for use on terminal blocks, wires, cables, and other industrial components.

- [1492-P Fuse](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-p-fuse.html) : Our Bulletin 1492-P Fuse IEC Push-in Terminal Blocks provide overcurrent protection and mount directly on a DIN rail.

- [AC Micro Splitters and Tees](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/ac-micro-splitters-and-tees.html) : Our AC Micro Splitters and Tees are designed for use with Bulletin 198 MDSA AC modules. The polyurethane (PUR) body provides oil and chemical resistance. The ratcheting coupling nuts provide superior vibration resistance.

- [DC Micro Splitters and Tees](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/dc-micro-splitters-and-tees.html) : Our DC Micro Splitters & Tees are designed for use with dual input distribution boxes and MaXum™ distributed I/O. The ratcheting coupling nuts provide superior vibration resistance.

IDC installation requires no tools. Simply insert the unstripped conductors into the connector body, and twist the connector ends together.

- [1492 NEMA Open Construction](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-nema-open-construction.html) : Our Bulletin 1492 Open Construction Terminal Blocks (Styles C and F) provide visual verification that the wire is properly positioned in the clamping area.

- [1492 NEMA Isolation Switch](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-nema-isolation-switch.html) : Our Bulletin 1492 Isolation Switch Terminal Blocks provide positive electrical circuit isolation. They are available in open and high-density styles.

- [1492 Fuse And Surge Suppressor](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-fuse-and-surge-suppressor.html) : Bulletin 1492 Fuse and Surge Suppressor Terminal Blocks are two-circuit blocks consisting of a series resistor/capacitor connected in parallel with a metal oxide varistor (MOV).

- [1492 Resistor, Voltage And Component](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-resistor--voltage-and-component.html) : Our Bulletin 1492 Resistor, Voltage-indicating, and Component Finger-safe Terminal Blocks complement our line of finger-safe terminal blocks.

- [1492 High-Density](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-high-density.html) : Our Bulletin 1492 High-density Finger-safe Terminal Blocks fall between the open-style NEMA/EEMAC terminal blocks and full-function IEC style terminal blocks.

- [1492 Panel Mount](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-panel-mount.html) : Our Bulletin 1492 NEMA Panel Mount Terminal Blocks are typically used when the installation requires only a few terminations. They reduce installation time, are ready to wire after mounting, and require no rail.

- [1492 Enclosed](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-enclosed.html) : Our Bulletin 1492 Enclosed Power Terminal Blocks offer numerous connector configurations and IP20 protection from the front.

- [1492 Power Distribution](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-power-distribution.html) : Bulletin 1492 Power Distribution Terminal Blocks use standard cross connections to allow power distribution to any number of terminals.

- [1492 Open-Style](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-open-style.html) : Our Bulletin 1492 Open-style Power Terminal Blocks distribute power to multiple loads.

- [1492 High-Fault](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-high-fault.html) : Our Bulletin 1492 High-fault SCCR Power Terminal Blocks with feeder spacing are available in numerous connector configurations.

- [1492 X-Y Plotter](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/connection-devices/1492-x-y-plotter.html) : Our Bulletin 1492 ClearPlot™ marking system is an X-Y plotter that provides a flexible marking tool for our terminal blocks in a compact design.

A cost-effective sub-metering option, our monitor provides critical data to help you make at-process decisions, reduce energy use, and increase your company's profits.

- [1788 ControlNet to Fieldbus](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/1788-controlnet-to-fieldbus.html) : Our Bulletin 1788 Redundant ContolNet™ to FOUNDATION Fieldbus (H1) Linking Device provides a fast and integrated solution for adding FOUNDATION Fieldbus devices to any Logix platform.

- [1788 ControlNet to Profibus-PA](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/1788-controlnet-to-profibus-pa.html) : Our Bulletin 1788 Redundant ControlNet™ to Profibus-PA Linking Device provides a fast and integrated solution for adding Profibus-PA field devices to any Logix platform.

- [1788 EtherNet/IP to DeviceNet](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/1788-ethernet-ip-to-devicenet.html) : Our Bulletin 1788 EtherNet/IP™ to DeviceNet Linking Devices provide a fast and integrated solution for adding DeviceNet™ to a new, or existing system.

- [1788 EtherNet/IP to Fieldbus](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/1788-ethernet-ip-to-fieldbus.html) : Our Bulletin 1788 Redundant EtherNet/IP™ to FOUNDATION Fieldbus (H1) Linking Device provides a fast and integrated solution for adding FOUNDATION Fieldbus devices to any Logix platform.

- [1788 EtherNet/IP to Profibus-PA](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/1788-ethernet-ip-to-profibus-pa.html) : Our Bulletin 1788 Redundant EtherNet/IP™ to Profibus-PA Linking Device provides a fast and integrated solution for adding Profibus-PA field devices to any Logix platform.

- [Smart Devices with IO-Link Technology](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/io-link-technology.html) : IO-Link Technology is a worldwide open-standard protocol that integrates sensors and other field devices into our Connected Enterprise by connecting the IO-Link enabled device into an IO-Link master module.

- [Data Highway Plus](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/data-highway-plus.html) : The Data Highway Plus (DH+) network is a local area network designed to support remote programming and messaging between computers and controllers for factory-floor applications.

- [DH-485](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/dh-485.html) : The DH‑485 industrial local area network is designed for factory-floor applications and uses the RS‑485 transmission standard.

- [SERCOS FOR MOTION](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/sercos-for-motion.html) : SERCOS (Serial Real-time Communications System) is an internationally-approved communication standard for motion control (IEC 61491).

- [Universal Remote I/O (RIO)](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/universal-remote-i-o--rio-.html) : Our Universal Remote I/O Link is a local area network designed to connect controllers to remote I/O chassis and a variety of intelligent devices such as operator interfaces and AC or DC drives.

- [Foundation Fieldbus for process](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/foundation-fieldbus-for-process.html) : The FOUNDATION Fieldbus standard provides the ability to distribute the control architecture throughout your facility.

- [HART (FAMILY) - FOR process](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/hart--family----for-process.html) : The HART (Highway Addressable Remote Transducer) protocol is a widely accepted standard for digitally enhanced communication with instrumentation within the process industries.

- [Stratix 5700 Industrial Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/stratix-5700-industrial.html) : As of September 1, 2025, our Stratix 5700 Industrial Managed Ethernet Switch will be discontinued and no longer available for sale.

- [Stratix 8300 Layer 3 Modular Managed](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/stratix-8300-layer-3-modular-managed.html) : Our Bulletin 1783 Stratix® 8300 Layer 3 Modular Managed Switches are discontinued and no longer available for sale. It is encouraged to migrate to the Stratix 5800 High Performance Managed Switch.

- [Stratix 8000 Modular Managed](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/industrial-network-products/stratix-8000-modular-managed.html) : Our Bulletin 1783 Stratix® 8000 Modular Managed Switches are discontinued and no longer available for sale. It is encouraged to migrate to the Stratix 5800 High Performance Managed Switch.

- [POINT Guard I/O Modules](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/i-o/1734-point-guard-i-o.html) : POINT Guard I/O™ modules are safety-rated I/O modules designed to fit into the standard POINT I/O™ system, offering automation and safety functionality in a maximum density I/O solution.

- [1718 Ex I/O Modules](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/i-o/1718-ex-i-o.html) : Our Bulletin 1718 Ex I/O modules are an intrinsically safe distributed I/O platform designed for Zone 1 hazardous areas, when placed in certified enclosures.

- [1719 Ex I/O Modules](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/i-o/1719-ex-i-o.html) : Our Bulletin 1719 Ex I/O modules are an intrinsically safe distributed I/O platform that can be mounted in Zone 2 or Class I, Div 2.

- [IEC Standard Contactors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/iec-standard-contactors.html) : Our Bulletin 100-C contactor line offers space-saving, high-performance design in 9...97 A contactors. These low power consumption contactors are designed to control motors and other loads.

- [IEC Large Contactors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/iec-large-contactors.html) : Our Bulletin 100-E next generation contactors are available in 9…2650 A sizes, helping to reduce width and weight while saving panel space.

- [NEMA Combination Contactors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/nema-combination-contactors.html) : Our NEMA Combination Contactors are available in either a disconnect switch or circuit breaker, mounted to a common device. Our products also have a variety of enclosures to suit various application needs.

- [Bulletin 100-K Miniature Contactors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/bulletin-100-k-miniature-contactors.html) : Our Bulletin 100-K IEC Miniature Contactors are designed for commercial and light industrial applications where panel space is at a premium. These miniature devices, at 45 mm wide, are shallower and have fewer panel depth requirements than standard IEC contactors.

- [IEC Safety Contactors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/iec-safety-contactors.html) : Our Bulletin 100S/104S IEC Safety Contactors provide mechanically linked, or mirror contact, performance up to 750 A, which is required in feedback circuits for modern safety applications.

- [Bulletin 100Q-C Capacitor-Switching Contactors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/bulletin-100q-c-capacitor-switching-contactors.html) : Our Bulletin 100Q Capacitor-switching Contactors are designed to switch banks of capacitors. The front-mounted resistor elements limit severe high inrush currents. This reduces stress to the contactors and the capacitors. Our contactors are compact and economical and do not use air-core reactors.

- [Bulletin 300 AC Contactors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/bulletin-300-ac-contactors.html) : Our Bulletin 300 NEMA contactors and motor starters provide a space-saving and cost-effective alternative for applications that require NEMA-rated motor control.

- [Bulletin 400 Definite Purpose Contactors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/bulletin-400-definite-purpose-contactors.html) : Bulletin 400 Definite Purpose Contactors are compact in size, allowing space savings while still supplying you with a high-performance product.

- [Bulletin 500F Feed-through Wiring for Motor Loads](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/bulletin-500f-feed-through-wiring-for-motor-loads.html) : Our Bulletin 500F AC contactors (open type) are available in feed-through wiring construction from NEMA size 0…5. Line terminals are at the top of the device and load terminals at the bottom.

- [Bulletin 500 Top Wiring for Motor Loads](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/bulletin-500-top-wiring-for-motor-loads.html) : Our Bulletin 500 AC contactors are available in top-wiring construction from NEMA size 00...9. All power connections are at the top of the contactors can switch AC motor loads where overload protection is not required or is provided separately.

- [Vacuum Contactors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/vacuum-contactors.html) : Our Bulletin 1102C/1104C and Bulletin 1502 NEMA Medium Voltage Vacuum Contactors provide motor control system reliability in harsh, dirty environments.

- [156C Solid-state Contactors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/156c-solid-state-contactors.html) : Our Bulletin 156-C Solid-state Contactors complement our line of Bulletin 700 solid-state relays to provide you with a complete line of solid-state solutions.

- [1503 Isolation Switch](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/1503-isolation-switch.html) : Our Bulletin 1503 Isolation Switch is a non-load-break type switch that works with the 1502 vacuum contactor and the 1503HM isolation switch handle to isolate the power cell when the isolation switch handle is moved to the OFF position.

- [1592 Load Break Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/1592-load-break-switches.html) : Our Bulletin 1592 Medium Voltage Load Break Switches are available with fused and non-fused options and specialty medium voltage control options for feeder and mains.

- [598 General Purpose Enclosures](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/598-general-purpose-enclosures.html) : Our Bulletin 598 line of enclosures include general purpose, junction box, and replacement enclosures designed for both indoor and outdoor applications.

- [598 Pushbutton Enclosures](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/598-pushbutton-enclosures.html) : We offer push button enclosures in 1- thru 4-hole configurations designed for both indoor and outdoor applications.

- [CENTERLINE 2100 Low Voltage Motor Control Center](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/centerline-2100-nema.html) : Increase productivity with a CENTERLINE 2100 NEMA motor control center. Our smart technology integrates a motor controller and power into a centralized package.

- [Cu-flex Flexible Copper Busbars](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/cu-flex-busbars.html) : Save time with flexible busbars. Cu-flex copper busbars are ideal for building new or modifying existing motor control centers to switchboards.

- [Motor Control Center Automation Software](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/intellicenter-software.html) : Industrial motor controller software. See inside your motor control center with real-time diagnostics. Increase productivity and uptime. Fast commissioning.

- [CENTERLINE 1500 Medium Voltage Motor Control Centers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/1500-arcshield-arc-resistant-controllers.html) : Our MCC improves industrial automation efficiency for heavy industrial manufacturing and processing environments and meets UL 347 safety standards.

- [SMC-50 Solid-State](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/smc-50-solid-state.html) : Our SMC™-50 soft starters are available with a current range from 108…480 A. Our SMC-50 fully solid-state soft starters are available from 90...520 A.

- [SMC Flex Smart Motor Controllers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/smc-flex-smart-motor-controllers.html) : Our SMC™ Flex Soft Starters are available with a current range from 5...1250 A.

- [SMC-3 Smart Motor Controller](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/smc-3-smart-motor-controller.html) : Our SMC™-3 Soft Starters are available with a current range from 3...480 A and they feature compact, true three-phase control in a cost-effective package. They include overload protection, integral bypass, and motor and system diagnostics.

- [STC Starting Torque Controller](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/stc-starting-torque-controller.html) : Our Bulletin 154 STC™ Starting Torque Controllers provide a cost-effective, soft-starting solution for low horsepower single- and three-phase squirrel cage induction motors.

- [CENTERLINE 1500 Medium Voltage Soft Starters](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/nema-centerline-1500-soft-starters.html) : CENTERLINE 1500 medium voltage soft starters feature a MV SMC™-50 smart motor controller and a range of starting and stopping modes for industrial applications.

- [1503 Medium Voltage Soft Starter OEM Components](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/1503-medium-voltage-soft-starters.html) : Our 1503 medium voltage soft starters with SMC-50 controllers provide microprocessor controlled starting for a range of three-phase AC induction motors.

- [LV IEC Combination Starters](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/lv-iec-combination-starters.html) : Our IEC Combination Starters include direct-on-line, reversing, and two-speed operating modes.

- [LV NEMA Combination Starters](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/lv-nema-combination-starters.html) : Our NEMA Combination Starters include across-the-line, reversing, and two-speed operating modes. These starters are flange operated, include 30.5 mm command and indication devices, and are available up to 510 Hp (810 A).

- [ArmorStart Distributed Motor Controllers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/armorstart-distributed-motor-controllers.html) : Our ArmorStart® Distributed Motor Controllers use quick disconnects for I/O, communications, motor, three-phase, and control power while offering several communication options.

- [Enclosed Starters](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/enclosed-starters.html) : Our IEC Enclosed Starters offer operating modes that include direct-on-line, reversing, and two-speed. They include 22.5 mm command and indication devices, and are available up to 85 A.

- [Soft Starters, Enclosed](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/soft-starters--enclosed.html) : Our enclosed SMC-3, SMC Flex, and SMC-50 soft starters are available as non-combination, combination fused disconnect, or combination circuit breaker starters.

- [NEMA Manual Motor Starters](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/nema-manual-motor-starters.html) : Our NEMA Manual Motor Starting Switches are designed for use on motor starting installation.

- [NEMA Pump Control Panels](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/nema-pump-control-panels.html) : Our NEMA Pump Control Panels have a flange handle that operates a motor circuit protector or a disconnect with visible blades.

- [NEMA Open/Enclosed Full Voltage Starters](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/nema-full-voltage-starters.html) : Our NEMA open and enclosed full voltage starters include across-the-line, reversing, and two-speed operating modes and are available up to 2250 A.

- [Open Type Starters](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/open-type-starters.html) : Our IEC open starters include direct-on-line, reversing, and variable speed operating modes and are available up to 97 A.

- [Bulletin 1109 Vacuum Starter](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/bulletin-1109-vacuum-starter.html) : Our Bulletin 1109 Open Vacuum Starters include across-the-line and reversing operating modes and are available up to 600 A.

- [CENTERLINE 2500 IEC Low Voltage Motor Control Center](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/motor-control/centerline-2500-iec.html) : As of July 31, 2025, our CENTERLINE 2500 Motor Control Centers will be discontinued and no longer available for sale.​

- [1497D General Purpose](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/power-supplies/1497d-general-purpose.html) : Our Bulletin 1497D General Purpose Transformers are generally used for supplying appliance, lighting, motorized machine, and power loads from electrical distribution systems.

- [1606-XLD DC-DC Converters](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/power-supplies/1606-XLD-Converters.html) : Our Bulletin 1606 XLD family of DC—DC converters contributes to system reliability and increases control circuit resiliance in the event of voltage fluctuations. Compact size helps to optimize panel space.

- [1608 DySC Voltage Sag Protectors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/power-supplies/1608-dysc-voltage-sag-protectors.html) : Our Bulletin 1608 DySC® Voltage Sag Protectors protect against voltage sags and momentary outages that account for a significant amount of manufacturing downtime and damaged equipment.
