- [440E Lifeline 3 Cable Pull Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/440e-lifeline-3-cable.html) : Our Bulletin 440E Lifeline™ 3 Cable Pull Switches are cable (rope) operated emergency-stop devices designed to meet the stringent requirements of ISO 13850 (Safety of Machinery—Emergency Stop Equipment).

- [440E Lifeline 4 Cable Pull Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/440e-lifeline-4-cable.html) : Our Bulletin 440E Lifeline™ 4 Cable Pull Switches can be installed along or around awkward machinery such as conveyors and provide a constant emergency stop access.

- [440E Lifeline 5 Cable Pull Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/440e-lifeline-5-cable.html) : Our Bulletin 440E Lifeline™ 5 Cable Pull Switches are microprocessor-based solutions that bring advanced features and diagnostics that help enhance safety and improve productivity.

- [440E Lifeline Rope Tensioner System](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/440e-lifeline-rope-tensioner.html) : Our Bulletin 440E Lifeline Rope Tensioner System (LRTS) is a unique cable (rope) tensioning system which enables quicker installation of cable actuated systems.

- [800R Hazardous Location Operators](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/800r-hazloc-push-buttons.html) : Our Bulletin 800R Hazardous Location Operators are designed for Division 2/Zone 2 hazardous locations.

- [800H Type 7 & 9 Hazardous Location Operators](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/800h-type-7and9-hazloc-push-buttons.html) : Our Bulletin 800H Type 7 & 9 Hazardous Location Operators offer unmatched selection, superior corrosion resistance, and choice of conduit seal-off solutions.

- [800G Hazardous Location Operators](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/800g-hazloc-push-buttons.html) : Our Bulletin 800G Hazardous Location Push Buttons are designed for industrial applications where flammable gases, vapors, or dusts may be present.

- [800B 16 mm Operators](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/800b-push-buttons.html) : Our Bulletin 800B 16 mm Operators can meet your light industrial and instrumentation application needs with their highly configurable and flexible design.

- [800K Piezoelectric](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/800k-piezoelectric.html) : Our Bulletin 800K Piezoelectric Push Buttons are available in 22.5 and 30.5 mm sizes.

- [800L Indicator Lights](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/800l-indicator-lights.html) : Our Bulletin 800L Indicator Lights are ideal for commercial-grade and light-industrial applications.

- [800P Touch/Palm Operators](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/800p-touch-palm-push-buttons.html) : Our Bulletin 800P Touch/Palm Operators are made for applications requiring electromechanical operation for safety, resistance to RFI, and an ergonomically sensitive design to reduce risk factors associated with cumulative trauma disorders.

- [800T 18 mm Pilot Lights](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/800t-18-mm-pilot-lights.html) : Our Bulletin 800T 18 mm Pilot Lights are a line of small, heavy-duty pilot lights.

- [800Z Zero-Force Touch Buttons](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/800z-touch-palm-push-buttons.html) : Our Bulletin 800Z Zero-Force Touch Buttons™ are designed for machine control systems that require the use of two hands.

- [855H General Purpose Electronic Horns](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/855h-general-purpose-electronic-horns.html) : Our Bulletin 855H General Purpose Electronic Horns produce a sound output of 108 dB (A) maximum, which is suitable for most mid-range industrial and institutional, single-status signaling applications.

- [855H High Performance Electronic Horns](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/855h-high-performance-electronic-horns.html) : Our Bulletins 855H and 855HM High Performance Electronic Horns are available as standalone electronic horns or with beacon. They are available in plastic or marine-grade aluminum housing.

- [855H Recordable Horns](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/855h-recordable-horns.html) : Our Bulletin 855H Recordable Horns allow you to download melodies or customized tones from any analog device (such as a PC, MP3 player, etc.). You can also record voice by speaking directly into the unit via an on-board microphone; you don't need to purchase additional recording hardware or equipment.

- [855P Panel Mount Signaling Alarms](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/855p-panel-mount-signaling-alarms.html) : Our Bulletin 855P Panel Mount Signaling Alarms reduce panel space requirements and installation time and are rear-securing and finger-safe.

- [855X HazLoc Horns and Beacons](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/855x-hazloc-horns-and-beacons.html) : Our Bulletin 855X Hazardous Location Signaling Devices are designed to alert you to critical equipment and system needs on the plant floor and are also triple certified to meet hazardous location global standards.

- [854J/K Control Tower Stack Lights](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/854j-k-control-tower-stack-lights.html) : These stack lights feature IP66 enclosure rating and are rated for indoor and outdoor use.

- [855B Mini Square Beacons](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/855b-mini-square-beacons.html) : These are ideal for signaling applications that require a compact, robust Xenon strobe beacon and are available as separate beacon indicators or in combination with a high performance horn.

- [855BS and 855R Industrial Round Beacons](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/855b-round-beacons.html) : Our Bulletin 855BS and 855R round beacons are available in two diameters, use LED technology and offer high flexibility for your applications.

- [855L Panel Light Bars](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/855l-panel-light-bars.html) : These light bars are ideal for OEMs and panel builders who want to reduce the quantity of components without losing reliability and/or functionality of their designs.

- [855W Wall Mount Signal Lights](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/855w-wall-mount-signal-lights.html) : These signal lights are designed to communicate the status of different conditions in the machine or critical equipment in a compact size housing.

- [856T Control Tower Stack Lights](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/push-buttons-and-signaling-devices/856tcontroltowerstacklights.html) : These stack lights give users maximum flexibility in meeting the widest range of applications with a reduced number of components.

## Relays and TimersAllen-Bradley Catalog

- [700-HA Tube Base Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-ha-tube-base.html) : These general purpose relays are ideally suited for applications with machine tool, pulp and paper, and transportation OEMs.

- [700-HB Square Base Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hb-square-base.html) : These relays are designed for HVAC, elevator, and automotive industry applications and offer IEC closed terminal and NEMA open terminal versions.

- [700-HC Miniature Ice Cube Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hc-miniature-ice-cube.html) : These are 4-pole plug-in relays for your low-energy switching applications.

- [700-HD Flange Mount Square Base Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hd-flange-mount-square-base.html) : These relays feature blade-style quick connect terminals.

- [700-HF Miniature Square Base Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hf-miniature-square-base.html) : These relays are ideal for automotive applications.

- [700-HG Power Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hg-power-relay.html) : These relays are suitable for switching DC loads and are available with an optional magnetic blowout for arc suppression, enabling switching of even higher current DC circuits.

- [700-HHF Flange Mount Power Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hhf-flange-mount-power.html) : These relays are small-sized general purpose relays that switch large loads.

- [700-HJ Magnetic-latching Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hj-magnetic-latching.html) : These relays control lighting loads or continuous duty applications to save energy.

- [700-HK Slim Line Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hk-slim-line.html) : These relays are ideal for a variety of high-density isolation and interposing applications.

- [700-HL Terminal Block Style Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hl-terminal-block-style.html) : These terminal block relays include a 6.2 mm wide per-pole interface and quick connections help reduce installation costs.

- [700-HP PCB Pin Style](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hp-pcb-pin-style.html) : Our Bulletin 700-HP Relays are general purpose relays with plug-in PIN-style printed circuit board (PCB) terminals.

- [700-HPS PCB Pin Style Safety Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hps-pcb-pin-style-safety.html) : These relays feature mechanically linked contacts that are required for safety circuits as per EN 50205 (Type B).

- [700-HTA Alternating Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hta-alternating.html) : These relays serve as interposing relays between your controller and field devices and lets you select the primary or secondary load or to alternate between the two.

- [700-FE Economy Timing Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-fe-economy.html) : These relays are 17.5 mm wide and have a timing range of 0.05 seconds to 100 hours.

- [700-FS High-performance Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-fs-high-performance.html) : These relays have a 22.5 mm space-saving design and a timing range of 0.05 seconds to 300 hours.

- [700-HLF Terminal Block Timing Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hlf-terminal-block-style.html) : These relays are relay- and socket-assembled modules for high-density applications.

- [700-HNC Miniature Timing Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hnc-miniature.html) : These relays are some of the smallest timing relays available. They require only 26 mm (1.02 in.) on a DIN Rail, with a socket.

- [700-HNK Ultra-slim Timing Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hnk-ultra-slim.html) : These relays are some of the smallest plug-in relays on the market. They require only 15.6 mm (5/8 in.) DIN Rail space in a socket.

- [700-HR Dial Type Timing Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hr-dial-type.html) : These relays are plug-in socket-mounted timing relays. They are easy to set, and can be panel- or DIN rail-mounted.

- [700-HT Tube Base Timing Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-ht-tube-base.html) : These relays are best for general purpose applications and mount on tube-type bases.

- [700-HV Repeat Cycle Timing Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hv-repeat-cycle.html) : These relays provide cycled on-off switching when a signal is applied. The on and off intervals are independently adjustable.

- [700-HX Multifunction Digital](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-hx-multifunction-digital.html) : These relays use a highly visible negative transmissive status indicator display to increase readability and offer two additional modes for application flexibility.

- [700-CF IEC Industrial Control Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-cf-control-relays.html) : These relays provide features required for demanding industrial applications such as mechanically linked contacts, timing options, and long contact life in an IEC design.

- [700-EF Industrial Control Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-ef.html) : These relays offer low power consumption and universal wide range coils which enables four coils to cover control voltages from 24V…500V, 50-60 Hz, DC.

- [700-K Miniature Industrial Control Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-k-miniature-control-relays.html) : These relays are compact sized  and capable of switching low-energy signals.

- [700S-CF IEC Safety Control Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700s-cf-safety-control-relays.html) : These relays provide mechanically or mirror contact performance, which are required in feedback circuits for safety applications.

- [700-P NEMA Heavy-Duty Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-p-heavy-duty-relays.html) : These relays offer time delay, latching attachments, overlapping, and logic need contacts and can be combined into one relay.

- [700S Heavy-duty Safety Control Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700s-heavy-duty-safety-control-relays.html) : These relays are designed to meet worldwide safety standards with mechanically linked contacts and tamper-resistant covers.

- [700-R NEMA Sealed Switch Industrial Control Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-r-sealed-switch-relays.html) : These relays include tungsten-tipped, hermetically sealed contacts provide high-reliability switching of low voltage circuits in harsh environments.

- [700-N NEMA Low Profile Industrial Control Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-n-industrial-relays.html) : These electrically held relays have manual override capability with easy-to-identify status indication on the highly visible red bar.

- [700-PS NEMA Solid-state Adjustable Timing Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-ps-solid-state-adjustable.html) : These relays can be mounted on 4-pole and 2-pole relays. Using an adapter plate, you can also mount it for standalone use.

- [700-RTC NEMA Solid-state Fixed Timing Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-rtc-solid-state-fixed.html) : These relays are fixed timing relays designed for applications requiring a specific time delay in which inadvertent timing changes must be avoided.

- [700-SA Tube Base Solid-state Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-sa-tube-base.html) : These relays are rated to 5 A load output current.

- [700-SC Ice Cube Solid-state Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-sc-ice-cube.html) : These relays are miniature, socketed relays rated to 3 A load output current.

- [700-SF Square Base Solid-state Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-sf-square-base.html) : These relays are 3 A rated solid-state relays compatible with HN116 sockets.

- [700-SH Hockey Puck Style Solid-state Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-sh-hockey-puck-style.html) : These relays can handle up to a 40 A continuous resistive load with heat sink in a hockey-puck shaped package.

- [700-SK Slim Line Solid-state Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/relays-and-timers/700-sk-slim-line.html) : These relays are compatible with HN121 or HN122 sockets and up to 2 A current ratings.

## Safety ProductsAllen-Bradley Catalog

- [GuardLink Technology](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/guardlink-technology.html) : Allen-Bradley® Guardmaster® smart safety devices that feature GuardLink technology deliver information, advanced functionality, and flexibility. This technology helps enhance safety and increase machine- and plant-wide efficiency.

- [440G-MZ](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440g-mz.html) : Our Bulletin 440G-MZ Guard Locking Switches allow full body access to the safeguarded area, where a high holding force and a wide tolerance to guard misalignment, and an escape release option are commonly required.

- [445L Guardshield POC Type 4 Micro 400 Safety Light Curtains](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/445l-poc-type-4-guardshield-micro-400.html) : These safety light curtains are economical three-box safety light curtains in a small housing.

- [440L Guardshield POC Type 4 Standard Safety Light Curtains](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440l-poc-type-4-standard.html) : Our Bulletin 440L Guardshield™ POC Type 4 safety light curtains are applied in applications where a formal risk assessment has determined that the hazard poses a moderate to high risk of operator injury.

- [450L GuardShield PAC Safety Light Curtains](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/450l-pac-guardshield.html) : These safety light curtains are for whole-body detection, as a person or object passes through a sensing field.

- [440L and 445L Guardshield POC Type 2 Low Risk Safety Light Curtains](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440l-poc-type-2-guardshield-type-2.html) : Our Bulletin 440L and 445L Guardshield™ POC Type 2 Low Risk safety light curtains are applied in applications where a formal risk assessment has determined that the hazard poses a low risk of operator injury.

- [450L GuardShield POC Safety Light Curtains](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/450l-b-safety-light-curtain.html) : These safety light curtains offer technology that allows each transceiver to be used as a transmitter or receiver via an innovative plug-in module.

- [440L Type 4 and 445L Safe 4 GuardShield PAC Safety Light Curtains](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440l-pac-type-4-guardshield.html) : These safety light curtains are applied in applications where a formal risk assessment has determined that the hazard poses a moderate to high risk of operator injury.

- [440L Area Access Control Single Beam Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440l-aac-single-beam.html) : Our Bulletin 440L Area Access Control Single Beam sensors provide whole-body access detection for hazardous areas.

- [440F Safedge Safety Edge Profiles](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440f-safedge-profiles.html) : Our Bulletin 440F Safedge™ Safety Edge Profiles come in three different cushion factors and two different materials. They have no rigid internal parts that can break through or cause fatigue failures after prolonged use.

- [440F MatGuard Safety Mats](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440f-matguard.html) : Our Bulletin 440F MatGuard™ Safety Mats are pressure-sensitive safeguarding products that we designed to detect the presence of people on the sensing surfaces.

- [442L SafeZone Safety Laser Scanners](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safezone-laser-scanners.html) : Our SafeZone™ Safety Laser Scanners are compact devices that have switchable, 
configurable fields and field sets (warning and safety).

- [440C-CR30](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440c-cr30.html) : Our Guardmaster® 440C-CR30 Software Configurable Safety Relay is flexible, cost-effective, and easy to use.

- [GuardLink EtherNet/IP Interface](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/432es-ethernetip-interface.html) : The GuardLink® EtherNet/IP module monitors three independent channels of GuardLink-enabled devices and communicates the status of those devices to a safety-rated controller over a CIP Safety EnterNet/IP network.

- [440R Guardmaster Safety Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/guardmaster-safety-relays.html) : Our Guardmaster® single-function safety relays are designed to meet functional safety standards, such as ISO 13849-1 or IEC 62061, and they offer key functions to simplify installation and system complexity.

- [Safety Relays Single-Function](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-relays-single-function.html) : Our MSR100 Single-function Safety Relays are ideal for relatively small safety applications and single zone control and available in electromechanical version, or solid-state models for applications involving high cycle rates.

- [Safety Relays Sipha](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-relays-sipha.html) : Our Sipha™ Control Units monitor and control Sipha non-contact safety sensors. For high-risk applications, the control unit is used with a single Sipha sensor to give a high-integrity system. For other applications, multiple sensors (including mechanical switches) can be connected to a single Sipha control unit.

- [440F Safedge Controllers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440f-safedge-controllers.html) : Our Bulletin 440F Safedge™ Controllers operate with our Bulletin 440F Safedge Safety Edge Profiles. The controllers continuously monitor the profile for actuation, and they generate an output signal when the profile is depressed.

- [Safety Relays Mat Controllers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-relays-mat.html) : Our MatGuard™ Control Unit monitors all of the mats that are connected together to form a safeguarded zone. The safeguarded zone can be up to a total of 100 m² and made from any number of mats.

- [Muting Light Curtain Monitoring Safety Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-relays-muting-light-curtain.html) : Our Muting Light Curtain Monitoring Relays allow the automatic temporary suspension of the safety function if certain conditions are met.

- [Speed Monitoring Safety Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-relays-speed.html) : Our MSR57P Speed Monitoring Safety Relays are designed for motion applications that require interaction by personnel during operation. Our MSR55P Speed Monitoring Safety Relays are used for standstill detection on single and three phase motors without the need for sensors.

- [Two-hand Control Monitoring Safety Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-relays-two-hand.html) : Our Two-hand Control Monitoring Safety Relays detect faults in two-hand controls, wiring, and contactors safety circuits.

- [MSR132 Monitoring Expansion Safety Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/msr132.html) : Our monitoring expansion safety relays have single or dual channel input with either immediate or time off delayed outputs.

- [Safety Relays Single-Function Delayed](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-relays-single-function-delayed.html) : Our Single-function Safety Relays with Delayed Outputs are used in applications where power must be maintained for a fixed duration after an input signal is received.

- [440G Atlas 5](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440g-atlas-5.html) : Our Atlas™ 5 Guard Locking Switch is a positive-mode, tongue-operated interlock switch. It locks a machine guard closed until power is isolated then keeps the power isolated while the guard is open.

- [442G Multifunctional Access Box](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/442g-multifunctional-access-box.html) : Our Guardmaster® 442G Multifunctional Access Box is a unique combination of guard locking and access control.

- [440G TLS-Z GD2](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440g-tls-z-gd2.html) : Our TLS-Z GD2 Guard Locking Switch is an interlock switch that has a uniquely coded RFID door sensor with inductive door position sensing technology.

- [440G TLS-GD2](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440g-tls-gd2.html) : Our TLS-GD2 Guard Locking Switch is a positive-mode, tongue-operated interlock switch.

- [440G-MT Solenoid](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440g-mt-solenoid.html) : Our 440G-MT solenoid switch is a positive-mode, tongue-operated guard locking interlock switch that locks a machine guard closed until power is isolated while the guard is open.

- [440G-LZ Guard Locking Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440g-lz.html) : Our 440G-LZ Guard Locking Switch is designed for partial body access guard doors. This switch combines microprocessor technology with an RFID coded actuator, and it features a locking bolt drive mechanism that locks only when the correct actuator is detected.

- [440G-EZ Electromagnetic](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440g-ez-electromagnetic.html) : Our Bulletin 440G-EZ Interlocking switch is designed to enhance machine safety as well as reliably help protect a working process from unplanned downtime, which will help improve productivity and increase efficiency.

- [440H Ensign 3 Hinge Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440h-ensign-3.html) : Our Ensign 3 Hinge Interlock Switches are hinge-actuated safety interlock switches that fit at the hinge point of guards.

- [440H Sprite Miniature Hinge Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440h-sprite-miniature.html) : Our Sprite Miniature Hinge Interlock Switches are hinge-actuated safety interlocks in a compact housing of only 75 x 25 x 29 mm (2.95 x 0.98 x 1.14 in.), making it one of the smallest interlocks currently available.

- [440H Rotacam Heavy-duty Hinge Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440h-rotacam-heavy-duty.html) : Our Rotacam™ Heavy-duty Hinge Interlock Switches are hinge-actuated safety interlock switches.

- [440N SensaGuard Non-contact Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440n-sensaguard.html) : Our SensaGuard™ Non-contact Interlock Switches feature the latest generation of RFID technology for coding and inductive technology for sensing.

- [440N Sipha Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440n-sipha-sensors.html) : Our  Sipha™ Sensors, with molded-in brackets and diminutive sizes, are extremely versatile and simple to install.

- [440N Ferrogard GS1, GS2 Non-contact Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440n-ferrogard-gs1--gs2.html) : Our Ferrogard™ GS1, GS2 Non-contact Interlock Switches are designed for heavy-duty applications.

- [440N Ferrogard GD2 Non-contact Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440n-ferrogard-gd2.html) : Our Ferrogard™ GD2 Non-contact Interlock Switch has a stainless steel housing for added protection against inadvertent impacts to the housing.

- [440N Ferrogard 6, 9, 10, 13, 14 Non-contact Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440n-ferrogard-6--9--10--13--14.html) : Our Ferrogard™ 6, 9, 10, 13, and 14 Non-contact Interlock Switches incorporate slim housings to accommodate narrow mounting areas.

- [440N Ferrogard 3, 4, 5 Non-contact Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440n-ferrogard-3--4--5.html) : Our Ferrogard™ 3, 4 and 5 Non-contact Interlock Switches have terminal connections. These magnetically actuated safety switches offer non-contact reliability together with tolerance to misalignment.

- [440N Ferrogard 1, 2, 20, 21 Non-contact Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440n-ferrogard-1--2--20--21.html) : Our Ferrogard™ 1, 2, 20, and 21 Non-contact Interlock Switches have plastic rectangular housings, making them ideal for wet environments. The magnetically actuated safety switches offer non-contact reliability together with tolerance to misalignment.

- [440N Magnetically Coded Non-contact Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440n-magnetically-coded.html) : Our Magnetically Coded Non-contact Interlock Switches, with molded-in brackets and diminutive sizes, are extremely versatile and simple to install. For high-risk applications, the control unit is used with a single sensor to give a high-integrity system.

- [440K Cadet 3 Tongue Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440k-cadet-3.html) : Our Cadet™ 3 Tongue Interlock Switches are tongue- or key-operated safety interlock switches that fit at the leading edge of sliding, hinged or lift-off guards.

- [440K Trojan T15 & T15-GD2 Tongue Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440k-trojan-t15-and-t15-gd2.html) : Our Trojan™ T15 & T15-GD2 Tongue Interlock Switches are compact universal tongue- or key-operated safety interlock switches that fit at the leading edge of sliding, hinged, or lift-off guards.

- [440K Trojan 5 & 6 Universal Tongue Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440k-trojan-5-and-6-universal.html) : Our Trojan™ 5 & 6 Universal Tongue Interlock Switches are universal tongue- or key-operated safety interlock switches.

- [440K MT-GD2 Tongue Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440k-mt-gd2.html) : Our MT-GD2 Tongue Interlock Switches are tongue- or key-operated safety interlock switches that fit at the leading edge of sliding, hinged, or lift-off guards.

- [440K Elf Miniature Tongue Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440k-elf-miniature.html) : Our Elf™ Miniature Tongue Interlock Switches are tongue-or key-operated safety interlock switches that fit at the leading edge of sliding, hinged, or lift-off guards.

- [440T Access & Chains Trapped Key Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440t-access-and-chains.html) : Our 440T Access/Chains Trapped Key Interlock Switches allow access to hazardous areas only when an appropriate key is inserted into the interlock.

- [440T Trapped Key Bolt Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440t-bolt.html) : Our 440T Trapped Key Bolt Interlock Switches allow access to hazardous areas only when an appropriate key is inserted into the interlock.

- [440T Trapped Key Switch with Electronic Timed-delay](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440t-timed-delay-unit.html) : Our 440T Electronic Timed-delay Unit Trapped Key Interlock Switches are used in applications that require an elapsed time to occur before allowing access to a hazardous area.

- [440T Trapped Key Switchgear Adaptors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440t-switchgear-adaptors.html) : Our 440T Trapped Key Switchgear Adaptor is used to interlock preparatory switch gear applications or other host equipment such as spool valves.

- [440T Trapped Key Stopped Motion Unit](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440t-stopped-motion-unit.html) : Our 440T Prosafe® Stopped Motion Unit (SMU) is used in applications that require the detection of stopped motion of mechanical parts of a machine.

- [440T Trapped Key Solenoid Release Unit](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440t-solenoid-release-unit.html) : Our 440T Trapped Key Solenoid Release Unit electrically isolates machinery to improve access safety.

- [440T Slamlock Trapped Key Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440t-slamlock.html) : Our 440T Slamlock™ Trapped Key Interlock Switches combine the features of trapped keys with tongue actuated interlocks.

- [440T Rotary Trapped Key Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440t-rotary.html) : Our 440T Rotary Trapped Key Interlock Switches are used for electrical isolation of machinery to improve safe access and also as teach boxes in robot cells.

- [440T Miniature Valve Trapped Key Interlock Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440t-miniature-valve.html) : Our 440T Miniature Valve Trapped Key Interlock Switches are an ideal solution for applications where space is at a premium.

- [440T Trapped Key Interlock Exchange Unit Switch](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440t-exchange-unit.html) : Our 440T Exchange Units for Trapped Key Interlock Switches are used in an interlocking sequence to link together other devices in the Prosafe® range.

- [440P 15 mm Plastic Safety Limit Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440p-15mm-plastic.html) : Our Bulletin 440P 15 mm Plastic Safety Limit Switches offer the performance of bigger units in the most compact case available.

- [440P 30 mm Metal Safety Limit Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440p-30-mm-metal.html) : Our Bulletin 440P 30 mm Metal Safety Limit Switches have a range of options including snap action, slow break/make with 2-, 3-, or 4-contact configurations, and a choice of actuator heads.

- [440P 22 mm Plastic Safety Limit Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440p-22-mm-plastic.html) : Our Bulletin 440P 22 mm Plastic Safety Limit Switches have a range of options including snap action, slow break/make with 2- or 3-contact configurations, and a choice of actuator heads.

- [440P 22 mm Metal Safety Limit Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/440p-22-mm-metal.html) : Our Bulletin 440P 22 mm Metal Safety Limit Switches have a small metal case and a choice of actuator heads.

- [Safety Drives](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-drives.html) : Safety options can help reduce machine downtime and increase productivity. To help you protect both your personnel and equipment, a variety of PowerFlex® drives are available with safety features.

- [Safety IO](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-io.html) : Our safety I/O portfolio offers local, distributed and On-Machine™ options with a wide range of performance and connectivity attributes to help improve compliance and machine performance.

- [Safety Motion Control](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-motion-control.html) : Our safety motion control products are designed to boost performance and energy efficiency while helping to maximize system safety.

- [Safety Motor Control](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-motor-control.html) : Our Safety Motor Control products help reduce the risks associated with the operation and maintenance of electrical equipment.

- [Safety Programmable Controllers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-controllers.html) : Our safety control systems bring the benefits of traditional programmable control to complex safety applications, replacing the hard-wired relay systems normally required to bring automated processes to a safe state.

- [Safety Relays Control](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-relays-control.html) : Our Safety Control Relays are designed to provide mechanical or mirror contact performance to meet worldwide safety standards.

- [Stop Motion Safety Monitors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-relays-stop-motion.html) : Our stop motion monitors are discontinued and no longer available for sale. Customers are encouraged to migrate to our GSR Guardmaster® Safety Relays.

- [CU3 Back EMF Monitoring Units](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-relays-back-emf.html) : Our Bulletin CU3 Back Electro-magnetic Field (EMF) monitoring units are discontinued and no longer available for sale. We recommend migrating to the MSR, GSR or CR30 safety relays.

- [MSR300 Series Modular Safety Relays](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/safety-relays-300-series.html) : Our Bulletin MSR300 safety relays are discontinued and no longer available for sale. We recommend migrating to the MSR, GSR or CR30 safety relays.

- [445L POC Type 4 GuardShield Safe 4](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/445l-poc-type-4-guardshield-safe-4.html) : Our Bulletin 445L GuardShield™ POC Type 4 Safe 4 safety light curtains are discontinued and no longer available for sale. We recommend migrating to the 450L GuardShield family of Safety Light Curtains.

- [442L Safety Camera, SC300](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/safety-products/442l-safety-camera--sc300.html) : Our Guardmaster™ SC300 Hand Detection Safety Sensor is a compact safety sensor system which operates based on image processing technology.

## Sensors and SwitchesAllen-Bradley Catalog

- [RightSight General Purpose Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42ef-rightsight.html) : These sensors are designed for light- to medium-level industrial use and feature a compact adaptable package to deliver excellent detection.

- [VisiSight Miniature Photoelectric Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/visisight.html) : These sensors offer a small rectangular package with visible light beam for ease of alignment and industry standard mounting.

- [Long-range Background Suppression Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42bc-ac-and-dc-long-range.html) : Our long-range background suppression sensors come in a robust, compact package and are ideal for mounting on a conveyor line or vibratory bowl feeder.

- [DC Long-range Background Suppression Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42bt-dc-long-range.html) : Our long-range background suppression sensors offer high performance sensing for applications where standard sensors are not practical.

- [Clearsight RightSight Clear Object Detection Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42ef-clearsight-rightsight.html) : These sensors have a modified optical system for improved detection of clear objects.

- [ClearSight 9000 Clear Object Detection Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42g-clearsight-9000.html) : Our ClearSight 9000 Clear Object Detection Sensors offer innovative optics which maximize the contrast and  increase reliability and productivity.

- [ColorSight Color and Contrast Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45clr-colorsight.html) : These color and contrast sensors feature three output channels, allowing for the concurrent sensing of three different colors.

- [Color Registration Mark Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45crm-color-registration-mark.html) : These sensors emit three LED colors to discern the difference in color between the registration mark and background.

- [ColorSight True Color Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/46clr-colorsight.html) : These true color sensors feature distance correction technology that confirms consistent color detection at ranges up to 65 mm.

- [Glass Fiber Optic Cables](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/43g-glass.html) : Our glass fiber optic cables are typically more durable than plastic fibers and are able to withstand higher temperatures.

- [Plastic Fiber Optic Cables](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/43p-plastic.html) : These plastic fiber optic cables are constructed of a single acrylic monofilament and are most efficient when used with visible red status indicator light sources.

- [Slim Fiber Optic Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42fa-slim.html) : Our slim fiber optic sensors fit almost anywhere and feature a sensing range comparable to that of larger fiber optic sensors.

- [Long-range Fiber Optic Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45fpl-long-range.html) : Our long-range fiber optic sensors have large status indicator displays and one touch multi-directional push-button set-up.

- [High-speed Fiber Optic Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45fsl-high-speed.html) : Our high-speed fiber optic sensors are a general purpose, DIN-rail mountable solution ideal for high-speed or simplistic applications.

- [Digital Display Fiber Optic Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45fvl-digital-display.html) : Our digital display fiber optic sensors offer sophisticated part detection, diagnostic and self-teach capabilities in a slim package.

- [DIN Rail Fiber Optic Amplifier](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/46dfa-din-rail-amplifier.html) : Our DIN Rail fiber optic amplifiers detect small objects and are ideal in limited spaces or applications that require detection at high speeds.

- [Plastic Optical Fork Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45lsp-plastic.html) : These sensors are a low-cost alternative to transmitted beam sensors for small parts detection.

- [Metal Optical Fork Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45lst-metal.html) : These sensors are designed for small part detection on machines and conveyors in industrial environments.

- [30 mm High Power General Purpose Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42af-long-range.html) : These sensors offer high performance in a robust, easy to install, and flexible mounting package.

- [18 mm Plastic General Purpose Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42ca-18-mm-plastic.html) : These sensors are ideal for light- to medium-duty industrial applications.

- [12 mm Metal General Purpose Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42cf-12-mm-metal.html) : These rugged sensors feature teach options that automatically adjust for optimal performance based on application characteristics.

- [18 mm Metal General Purpose Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42cm-18-mm-metal.html) : These sensors are intended for heavy duty industrial applications.

- [Stainless Steel Cylindrical Sensor](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42cs-stainless-steel.html) : These sensors are available in a wide range of sensing modes and are ideal for food, beverage and pharmaceutical applications.

- [Series 9000 General Purpose Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42g-series-9000.html) : With nearly 300 configurations, Series 9000 sensors have the versatility to easily interface with programmable controllers and other electrical loads.

- [18 mm LaserSight Photoelectric Laser Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42cm-18-mm-lasersight.html) : Our 18 mm laser sensors are general purpose photoelectric sensors for long range, heavy duty applications.

- [LaserSight RightSight Photoelectric Laser Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42ef-lasersight-rightsight.html) : Our LaserSight™ RightSight™ sensors use eye-safe visible laser light and features the same mounting as standard RightSight products.

- [LaserSight 9000 Photoelectric Laser Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42gr-lasersight-9000.html) : Our LaserSight™ 9000 sensors are ideal for dusty and dirty applications requiring longer range and small object detection.

- [Teach-in Measurement Photoelectric Laser Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45bpd-teach-in-lock-out.html) : These sensors are ideal for applications that require reliable inspection, position and measurement.

- [Non-contact Measurement Photoelectric Laser Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45brd-measurement.html) : These sensors are ideal for industrial applications requiring reliable non-contact inspection, positioning and measurement.

- [Long-range Measurement Photoelectric Laser Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45cpd-long-range.html) : These sensors are ideal for long-range, applications including error proofing.

- [Distance Measurement Photoelectric Laser Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45dms-measurement.html) : These sensors are ideal for precise distance measurement and feature IO-Link functionality for enhanced diagnostics.

- [Mid-to Long-range Measurement Photoelectric Laser Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45lms-measurement.html) : These sensors are excellent for mid- to long-range solutions.

- [Short-range Photoelectric Laser Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45mld-short-range.html) : These Class II diffuse sensors are designed for accurate sensing of small targets.

- [45AST Area](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45ast-area.html) : These scanners are compact, easy-to-use non-safety light screens for small part detection and assembly applications.

- [45DLA Discrete](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45dla-discrete.html) : These sensors detect targets anywhere in a two dimensional area, even if the parts are irregularly shaped, sized or positioned.

- [45MLA Measuring](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45mla-measuring.html) : These sensors detect or measure targets in a two dimensional area, even if the parts are irregularly shaped, sized, or positioned.

- [45PLA Polarized](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45pla-polarized.html) : These sensors are designed to detect irregularly shaped objects in a wide range of industries and applications.

- [45PVA Part Verification](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45pva-part-verification.html) : These sensors are specifically designed for bin-picking applications and object detection in the parts assembly industry.

- [42KA Flat Pack](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42ka-flat-pack.html) : These sensors offer high-performance sensing in a sub-miniature package  applications where small size is key.

- [60-GR Series 9000 Gate Entry](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/60-gr-series-9000-gate-entry.html) : These sensors are UL 325 recognized and UL 508 listed  for detection of vehicles in automatic access control (gate entry) applications.

- [Series 5000 Hazardous Location Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42-series-5000.html) : Our Series 5000 Hazardous Location Sensors consist of two major components: a photohead and a power base.

- [Luminescence Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45lum.html) : Our luminescence photoelectric sensors detect the presence of luminescent/fluorescent particles and materials which are invisible to the human eye.

- [871D Hydraulic Positioning](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871d-hydraulic-positioning.html) : Our Bulletin 871D Cylinder Position Sensors are ideal for end-of-stroke detection on hydraulic and pneumatic cylinders.

- [871D WorldClamp](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871d-worldclamp.html) : Our Bulletin 871D WorldClamp™ Sensors are ideal for end-of-stroke detection in power clamp and gripper applications.

- [802PR Glass Polyester Limit Switch Style Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802pr-limit-switch-style.html) : Our Bulletin 802PR Glass Polyester Limit Switch Style Sensors are a non-contact alternative to limit switches, housed in a self-extinguishing, glass-reinforced polyester body.

- [871P VersaCube Multi-Position](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871p-versacube-multi-position.html) : Our Bulletin 871P Rectangular VersaCube™ Multi-Position Sensors are an economical and versatile solution for long-range sensing needs in a convenient, compact package.

- [871P Canning Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871p-canning-sensors.html) : Our Bulletin 871P Rectangular Sensors for Canning are specifically designed for sensing size 202 to 704 metal cans without physical contact.

- [871L, 872L Limit Switch Style](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871l--872l-limit-switch-style.html) : Our Bulletin 871L and 872L Plastic Limit Switch Style Sensors are a non-contact alternative to NEMA-style limit switches.

- [Mini Flat Pack Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871fm-mini-flat-pack-washdown.html) : Our Bulletin 871FM Mini Flat Pack Sensors feature metal housing and select models include full stainless steel housing and face to meet demanding application needs.

- [871F Flat Pack Washdown](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871f-flat-pack-washdown.html) : Our Bulletin 871F Plastic Flat Pack Sensors are ideal for applications where extremely long sensing ranges are required.

- [871F Aluminum Washdown](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871f-aluminum-washdown.html) : Our Bulletin 871F Aluminum Block Sensors boast rugged aluminum construction and sensing range of 70 mm.

- [871C Analog](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871c-analog.html) : Our Bulletin 871C Tubular Analog Sensors are self-contained, general purpose, solid-state devices designed to sense the presence of ferrous and nonferrous metal objects without touching them.

- [872C General Purpose](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/872c-general-purpose.html) : Our Bulletin 872C WorldProx™ Tubular General Purpose Inductive Proximity Sensors are the perfect all-purpose answer for less aggressive yet still demanding applications.

- [Tubular Weld Field Immune Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871z-weld-field-immune.html) : Our weld field immune sensors feature immunity to magnetic fields as well as weld-slag build-up.

- [871TS Food and Beverage](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871ts-food-and-beverage.html) : Our Bulletin 871TS Food and Beverage Inductive Proximity sensors are designed to address the most demanding applications in the food and beverage industry.

- [871TM Tubular Stainless Steel Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871tm-stainless-steel.html) : Our Bulletin 871TM Tubular Stainless Steel Sensors are ideal for harsh or extremely demanding environments. These sensors resist impact, abrasion and corrosion—to keep things moving where ordinary sensors grind to a halt.

- [871T Food and Beverage](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871t-food-and-beverage.html) : Our Bulletin 871T Tubular Food & Beverage Sensors can withstand high-pressure washdown applications in the food and beverage industry.

- [871C Mini Tubular](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871c-mini-tubular.html) : Our Bulletin 871C Mini Tubular Sensors are self-contained, general purpose, solid-state devices designed to sense the presence of ferrous and nonferrous metal objects without touching them.

- [871C Intrinsically Safe](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871c-intrinsically-safe.html) : Our Bulletin 871C Tubular Intrinsically Safe Sensors are NAMUR-style sensors—the sensor input and output conforms to NAMUR specifications (DIN 19 234).

- [871C Extended Temperature](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871c-extended-temperature.html) : Our Bulletin 871C Tubular Extended Temperature Sensors are ideal for industrial environments where temperatures can reach as high as 212 °F (100 °C ) or as low as -40 °F (-40 °C).

- [871R, 871S Ring and Slot](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/871r--871s-ring-and-slot.html) : Our Bulletin 871R Ring Inductive Proximity Sensors are specialty inductive sensors that determine the presence of metal objects passing through them.

- [873C Proximity-Style](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/873c-proximity-style.html) : Our Bulletin 873C Proximity-style Ultrasonic Sensors can detect solid and liquid targets from a distance of up to 1 m (3.3 ft).

- [873P Analog or Discrete Output Ultrasonic Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/873p-analog-or-discrete-output.html) : Our Bulletin 873P Analog or Discrete Output Ultrasonic Sensors are IO-Link enabled, and are ideal for applications that can be challenging for other sensing technologies, such as in the detection of clear, shiny or non-reflective objects.

- [873M General Purpose](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/873m-general-purpose.html) : Our Bulletin 873M General Purpose Ultrasonic Sensors are designed to detect solid or liquid targets by using sound waves.

- [873E Clear Object](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/873e-clear-object.html) : Our Bulletin 873E RightSound™ Clear Object Ultrasonic Sensors are opposed-mode sensors consisting of an emitter and a receiver.

- [Capacitive Proximity Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/capacitive-proximity.html) : Our capacitive proximity sensors feature metal, non-metal, solid and liquid detection, and the ability to detect some targets through other materials.

- [Reconfigurable 3D Sensing](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/reconfigurable-3d-sensing.html) : Our Swift-E 3D Reconfigurable sensors are ideal for completeness (item count) checks, product level detection or box filling and palletizer layering.

- [802B Compact](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802b-compact.html) : Our Bulletin 802B Compact Limit Switches are small with rugged enclosures and are ideal for mounting in areas too small for traditional NEMA-style limit switches.

- [802B Small Precision](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802b-small-precision.html) : Our Bulletin 802B Small Limit Switches are similar to the 802B Precision Limit Switches with some additional features. They have an enclosure rating of NEMA 6 and IP67, a rubber cable gland sealing the control cable entry, and 12 head configurations.

- [802B Precision Limit Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802b-precision.html) : Our Bulletin 802B Precision Limit Switches use a die-cast housing with 1/2 NPT conduit entry. These switches are available with five unique head configurations and two mounting styles. Each head is available as standard or with a rubber boot for additional sealing.

- [802R NEMA Type 13 Sealed Contact](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802r-nema-type-13-sealed-contact.html) : Our Bulletin 802R NEMA Type 13 Sealed Contact Hazardous Location Limit Switches feature a rugged single contact, hermetically sealed in a glass envelope that has excellent contact reliability even in contaminated atmospheres.

- [802XR NEMA Type 7 & 9 Sealed Contact](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802xr-nema-type-7-and-9.html) : Our Bulletin 802XR NEMA Type 7 and 9 Sealed Contact Hazardous Location Limit Switches operate in atmospheres and locations defined as Class I, Groups B, C or D or Class II, Groups E, F or G in the National Electrical Code.

- [802X NEMA Watertight](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802x-nema-watertight.html) : Our Bulletin 802X NEMA Type 4 watertight limit switches are designed for indoor use to protect the internal parts against water seepage, splashing, falling water, or hose directed water.

- [801 General Purpose](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/801-general-purpose.html) : Our Bulletin 801 General Purpose Limit Switches are ideal for a wide variety of applications. Snap action limit switches have a high snap-through force when the mechanism travels the required distance.

- [802G Gravity Return Limit Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802g-gravity-return.html) : Our Bulletin 802G Gravity Return Limit Switches are plug-in, gravity-return limit switches with an extremely low operating torque.

- [802M Factory Sealed Limit Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802m-factory-sealed.html) : Our Bulletin 802M Factory Sealed Limit Switches meet the requirements for NEMA 1, 4, 6P, and 13 enclosures.

- [802MC Corrosion Resistant Limit Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802mc-corrosion-resistant.html) : Our Bulletin 802MC Corrosion Resistant Limit Switches are pre-wired and factory sealed to provide corrosion protection in wet or dry locations.

- [802T Low-Energy Limit Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802t-low-energy.html) : Our Bulletin 802T Low-Energy Limit Switches have welded gold and silver alloy contacts to provide a protective barrier against surface oxides.

- [802T NEMA Style Limit Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802t-nema-style-limit-switches.html) : Our Bulletin 802T Direct Opening Action limit switches are used for safety applications per ISO 14119. These limit switches have the same mounting dimensions as other NEMA style limit switches.

- [802T Oiltight Limit Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802t-oiltight.html) : Our Bulletin 802T Oiltight Limit Switches provide heavy-duty pilot ratings, small size, a high degree of versatility, and a rugged NEMA Type 13 oiltight construction.

- [802X Watertight Limit Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802x-watertight.html) : Our Bulletin 802X Watertight Limit Switches have internal parts that are protected against splashing or hose-directed water seepage within the limits of the NEMA specified tests for Type 4 watertight enclosures. These switches are not sleet- or ice-proof.

- [802K 30 mm Metal](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/802k-30-mm-metal.html) : Our Bulletin 802K 30 mm Metal Limit Switches have a range of options including snap action, slow break/make with 2-, 3-, or 4-contact configurations and a choice of actuator heads.

- [Electromechanical Pressure Controls](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/836-electromechanical.html) : Our Bulletin 836 electromechanical pressure controls are designed to control or monitor the operating conditions of many types of pneumatic or hydraulic applications.

- [Solid-state Pressure Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/836p-solid-state.html) : Our Bulletin 836P solid-state pressure sensors measure liquids or gases from -14.5...10,000 psi. These sensors are available in display and non-display models with IO-Link Technology, discrete, and analog outputs.

- [Externally Adjustable Electromechanical Pressure Controls](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/836t-adjustable-electromechanical.html) : Our Bulletin 836T externally adjustable electromechanical pressure controls meet the traditional requirements of the transportation and machine tool industries.

- [Electromechanical Temperature Controls](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/837-electromechanical.html) : Our Bulletin 837 electromechanical temperature controls family of condition sensing products includes rugged, industrial-grade temperature controls.

- [Solid-state Temperature Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/837t-solid-state.html) : Our Bulletin 837T solid-state temperature sensors are capable of measuring temperature in liquids, gases, and vapors from -50…+250 °C (-58…+482 °F).

- [Resistance Temperature Detectors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/837rtd.html) : Our Bulletin 837RTD resistance temperature detectors have a wide temperature range -50…+200 °C (-58…+392 °F), probe lengths, and process connections.

- [Float Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/840-float.html) : Our Bulletin 840 float switches are heavy-duty industrial control devices. They open and close contacts in response to changes in liquid level.

- [Solid-state Level Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/840e-solid-state.html) : Our Bulletin 840E solid-state level switches are microprocessor-based and designed to withstand harsh industrial conditions and wash-down applications such as liquid level monitoring in tanks, containers and pipelines.

- [Flow Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/839e-solid-state.html) : Our Bulletin 839E solid-state flow switches monitor and display liquid media flow rate from 0.03 to 3 m/sec (0.1 to 9.84 ft/sec). This sensor measures both flow and temperature and is available with two different probe insertion lengths.

- [Speed Sensing Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/808-speed-sensing.html) : Our Bulletin 808 speed sensing switches provide an electrical contact signal at a determined speed for plugging, anti-plugging, speed sensing, and direction of rotation.

- [48CR Code Reader](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/48cr-code-reader.html) : Our Bulletin 48CR Code Readers are the smallest industrial code readers on the market.

- [Radio Frequency Identification Systems](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/rfid-systems.html) : Our RFID Systems are ideal for tracking and documenting products as they move through the manufacturing process in light-duty industrial applications.

- [440H Pneumatic Rotacam Hazardous Location Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/440h-pneumatic-rotacam.html) : Our Pneumatic Rotacam™ Hazardous Location Switches provide positive-acting isolation of a machine's compressed air supply.

- [440 Guardmaster Explosion-Proof Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/440-explosion-proof.html) : Our Guardmaster® Explosion-Proof Switches have sealed flameproof contact blocks, making them suitable for use in European Zone 1 and Zone 2 hazardous environments.

- [Sensors on IO-Link Can Enable the Connected Enterprise](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/sensors-on-io-link-can-enable-the-connected-enterprise.html) : Watch how smart sensors with IO-Link can enable smart machines for The Connected Enterprise®.

- [Short-range Background & Foreground Suppression](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/44b-short-range-foreground.html) : Our 44B Short-range Background & Foreground Suppression sensors are discontinued and no longer available for sale.

- [45LFM Capacitive Photoelectric Label Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/45lfm-capacitive.html) : Our Bulletin 45LFM Capacitive Photoelectric Label Sensors are discontinued and no longer available for sale.

- [42GR Series 9000 Diagnostic](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42gr-series-9000-diagnostic.html) : Our Series 9000™ Diagnostic Photoelectric Sensors are discontinued and no longer available for sale.

- [837E Solid-state Temperature Switches](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/837e-solid-state.html) : Our Bulletin 837E Solid-state Temperature Switches are discontinued and no longer available for sale. We encourage you to migrate to Bulletin 837T Solid-state Temperature Sensors.

- [Short-range Background Suppression Sensors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/sensors-and-switches/42ba-short-range.html) : Our Bulletin 42B short-range background suppression sensors are discontinued and no longer available for sale.

## Signal InterfaceAllen-Bradley Catalog

- [931 Signal Conditioners](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/signal-interface/931-signal-conditioners.html) : Our Bulletin 931N Nano and 931S Smart signal conditioners provide a full range of options to isolate, convert, split, linearize, and amplify a broad range of signal types.

- [937C Converter Barriers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/signal-interface/937c-converter-barriers.html) : Our Bulletin 937C Converter Barriers add functionality to the isolators by receiving signals from a hazardous area instrument i.e., temperature sensors, or load cells, and then converting them to an industry standardized signal such as 0/4…20mA or 0/2…10V.

- [937T Isolator Barriers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/signal-interface/937t-isolator-barriers.html) : Our 937T Isolator Barriers include galvanic optical or transformer isolation, these modules provide an interface within the intrinsic safety circuit that is electrically separated from the control system.

- [937Z Zener Barriers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/signal-interface/937z-zener-barriers.html) : Our Bulletin 937Z Zener Barriers provide protection for electrical signals within hazardous areas. These barriers feature a narrow profile of just 12.5 mm to maximize control panel space.

## Variable Frequency Drive (VFD)Allen-Bradley Catalog

- [Armor PowerFlex Drives](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/armor-powerflex.html) : Our Armor PowerFlex 35-series On-Machine drive system provides an integrated, near-motor, pre-engineered solution designed for harsh environments.

- [PowerFlex 755TS Low Voltage VFD](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/powerflex-755ts.html) : With predictive analytics, a PowerFlex 755TS variable frequency drive (VFD) helps increase productivity and uptime. Plus, reduce energy and maintenance costs.

- [PowerFlex 755T Low Voltage VFD](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/20g-powerflex-755t.html) : Our PowerFlex® 755T low voltage variable frequency drives are designed to provide harmonic mitigation, regeneration, and common bus solutions that help reduce energy costs, add flexibility, and increase productivity.

- [25A PowerFlex 523](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/25a-powerflex-523.html) : Our PowerFlex® 523 AC Drives provide an innovative, modular design that supports fast and easy installation and configuration.

- [25B PowerFlex 525](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/25b-powerflex-525.html) : Our PowerFlex 525 drives, which offer a power rating of 0.4...22 kW (0.5...30 Hp) with global voltage classes of 100...600V, provide a variety of motor control and flexible mounting options.

- [25C PowerFlex 527](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/25c-powerflex-527.html) : Our PowerFlex® 527 AC Drives are designed to work exclusively with our Logix PACs to leverage the capabilities of the controller and use Studio 5000 Logix Designer™ to help simplify machine development and use.

- [PowerFlex 6000 Medium Voltage Drive (VFD)](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/powerflex-6000-ac-drive.html) : The high-performance medium voltage VFD for new and retrofit constant and variable-torque motor control applications: pumps, conveyors, mixers & chillers

- [PowerFlex 7000 Medium Voltage VFD](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/powerflex-7000-ac-drive.html) : Our PowerFlex 7000 medium voltage drives (VFDs) offer precise motor speed and torque control for industrial applications, increasing productivity & savings.

- [22F PowerFlex 4M](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/22f-powerflex-4m.html) : Our PowerFlex® 4M AC Drives offer feed-through wiring and easy programming that provides the flexibility to handle a broad range of applications.

- [22A PowerFlex 4](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/22a-powerflex-4.html) : Our PowerFlex® 4 AC Drives are designed to meet global OEM and end-user requirements for simplicity, space savings, and cost efficiency.

- [22B PowerFlex 40](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/22b-powerflex-40.html) : Our PowerFlex® 40 AC Drives provide OEMs, machine builders, and end users with performance-enhancing motor control in an easy-to-use compact package.

- [22D PowerFlex 40P](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/22d-powerflex-40p.html) : Our PowerFlex® 40P AC Drives provide closed-loop control with an option for Category 3 Safe Torque-off in a compact and cost-effective design.

- [22C PowerFlex 400](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/22c-powerflex-400.html) : Our PowerFlex® 400 AC Drives are optimized for control of commercial and industrial fans and pumps.

- [20F PowerFlex 753](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/20f-powerflex-753.html) : Our PowerFlex® 753 AC Drives are cost-effective and easy to use in general purpose applications requiring safety features.

- [20G PowerFlex 755](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/20g-powerflex-755.html) : Our PowerFlex® 755 AC Drives are well-suited for a wide variety of motor control applications including pumps, fans, and conveyors.

- [20A PowerFlex 70](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/20a-powerflex-70.html) : Our PowerFlex® 70 AC Drives are compact packages of power, control, and operator interface designed to meet demands for space, simplicity, and reliability.

- [20B PowerFlex 700](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/20b-powerflex-700.html) : Our PowerFlex® 700 AC Drives control three-phase induction motors in applications with requirements ranging from the simplest speed control to the most demanding torque control.

- [20L PowerFlex 700L](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/20l-powerflex-700l.html) : Our PowerFlex® 700L AC Drives offer either PowerFlex 700 Vector Control or PowerFlex 700S Control on a fully regenerative, liquid-cooled power structure.

- [20D PowerFlex 700S](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/20d-powerflex-700s.html) : Our PowerFlex 700S AC drive with the DriveLogix™ option combines the powerful performance and flexible control of PowerFlex AC drives with a high-performance Logix engine to produce a highly functional, cost-effective drive and control solution.

- [20S PowerFlex SCR Bridge](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/20s-powerflex-scr-bridge.html) : Our Bulletin 20S SCR Bridge is a non-regenerative DC bus supply that supplies power to AC drives that have a common DC bus input.

- [Powerflex 7000 with Arc Flash Resistance](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/powerflex-7000-with-arcshield.html) : Our PowerFlex® 7000 Drive System with ArcShield™ technology provides an arc fault rating up to 50 kA and meets Type 2B accessibility protection standards.

- [20P PowerFlex DC](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/20p-powerflex-dc.html) : Our full line of PowerFlex® DC drive products includes PowerFlex DC digital drives, PowerFlex DC standalone regulators (SAR), and PowerFlex DC field controllers.

- [9303 DriveTools SP](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/9303-drivetools-sp.html) : DriveTools™ SP is a family of software tools that provides a simplified interface for programming, maintenance and troubleshooting of select PowerFlex® AC and DC drives.

- [Smart VFD Technology](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/smart-vfd-technology.html) : Increase productivity with a PowerFlex VFD, variable frequency drive. Real-time predictive analytics increase throughput, uptime, energy savings.

- [700AFE PowerFlex Regenerative](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/products/hardware/vfd/700afe-powerflex-regenerative.html) : Our Bulletin 700AFE Active Front End (AFE) regenerative DC bus supply are discontinued and no longer available for sale. Customers are encouraged to migrate to our PowerFlex 755T Drives.

## Workforce Development & Industrial Training Services Catalog
