- [Training Workstations](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/workstations.html) : Our training workstations mirror your manufacturing processes for the most realistic experience possible to get employees up-to-speed quickly.

- [Learning+ Training Subscriptions](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus.html) : Access self-paced e-learning and virtual instructor-led training in automation technology courses covering control, visualization, drives, motion, and more.

- [Certificate Programs](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/certificate-programs.html) : Our Logix, Drives, and Motion Certificate Programs are for professionals who want to develop knowledge and skills using the latest automation technology.

- [Training Workstation Lab Books](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/lab-books.html) : Our lab books are created for our training workstation, so students can practice skills in a safe environment.

- [Instructor-led Courses](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led.html) : We offer in-person training designed to align with specific job functions and focus on relevant job tasks.

- [Training Course Catalog](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/training-course-catalog.html) : Browse our full training course catalog to find e-learning and instructor-led courses to further your industrial automation skills.

## Training Workstations Catalog

- [Kinetix 5700 Servo Drive Training Workstation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/workstations/kinetix-5700-abt-tdk5700.html) : This workstation can help you configure, program, commission, and run Kinetix 5700 servo drives on an EtherNet/IP network.

- [CompactLogix 5380 and PanelView 7 Workstation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/workstations/compactlogix-5380-panelview-7-abt-tdcmpx-pvp7.html) : This workstation can address the training simulation needs of your business by providing a superior approach to simulating plant-floor visualization.

- [ControlLogix with 5069 Compact I/O Workstation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/workstations/controllogix-5069-compact-io-abt-tdclx4.html) : This workstation simulates the same control schemes running in your plant. It includes a 4-slot I/O chassis for module expansion and flexibility.

- [ControlLogix Workstation – No Motion](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/workstations/controllogix-no-motion-abt-tdclx3-c.html) : This workstation simulates the same control schemes in your plant. It includes a 10-slot I/O chassis for module expansion and flexibility.

- [GuardLogix Controller Workstation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/workstations/guardlogix-controller-abt-tdgrdlx1-c.html) : This workstation can be used to program safety instructions within a GuardLogix safety task for monitoring safety-circuitry.

- [PowerFlex 755 AC Drive Workstation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/workstations/powerflex-755-abt-tdpf755-a.html) : This workstation provides multiple communication options, including embedded EtherNet/IP, to make it a workhorse for your drive training application needs.

- [Micro850 Controllers Workstation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/workstations/micro850-abt-tdm850.html) : This assembled workstation gives hands-on experience with basic installation, wiring, configuring, and troubleshooting

- [Learning+: Tubing and Fittings](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/tubing-and-fittings.html) : This course will explore tubing fundamentals including identifying the proper materials for the application, how to use the proper tools, and calculating material requirements for a job.

- [Learning+: Instrumentation & Control Process Control](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/instrumentation---control-process-control.html) : This course covers the purpose of process controls systems, including different types of controllers, open- and closed- loop controls including when to use them, and PID controls.

Enroll now to enhance your skills.

- [Learning+: Semi-Conductors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/semi-conductors.html) : This course teaches the theory and application of semi-conductors including the characteristics of semi-conductor components, and how to repair and design a semi-conductor circuit.

- [Learning+: Electronic Circuits](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/electronic-circuits.html) : This course provides the basic understanding of electronic circuits including operational amplifier circuits, and power suply circuits.

- [Learning+: Digital electronics](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/digital-electronics.html) : This course introduces simple digital circuits.

- [Learning+: Instrumentation Measurement Applications](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/instrumentation-measurement-applications.html) : This course provides basic measurement principles and troubleshooting methods for pressure, level, temperature, and flow sensors.

- [Learning+: Prints and Drawings](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/prints-and-drawings.html) : This course provides students with the skills needed to read and understand various prints and drawings such as schematic diagrams, logic diagrams, and several others.

- [Learning+: Freeze Protection](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/freeze-protection.html) : This course provides an overview of electrical heating cables and antifreeze equipment used in freeze protection applications.

- [Learning+: Electrical Control Devices](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/electrical-control-devices.html) : In this course, the student will learn about the purpose of control devices, types of control devices, the applications of the different devices, and how to troubleshoot the devices.

- [Learning+: Limitorque Valves](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/limitorque-valves.html) : This course focuses on the operation, maintenance, and repair of Limitorque valve actuators.

- [Learning+: Microprocessors](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/microprocessors.html) : This course covers microprocessors basics, functionality and basic programming.

- [Learning+: Programmable Logic Controllers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/programmable-logic-controllers.html) : Learn to operate and troubleshoot PLCs effectively with our comprehensive e-learning course. Enhance your skills in ladder logic and PLC components today.

- [Learning+: Soldering](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/soldering.html) : This course provides proper techniques for soldering in electrical circuits.

- [Learning+: Control Instrumentation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/control-instrumentation.html) : This course covers the wide variety of control instrumentation including electronic analog circuits, pneumatic control instruments, and pressure regulators.

- [Learning+: Final Control](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/final-control.html) : This course provides an introduction to control loops, including their basic operating principles and the function and operation of instruments used in measuring level, flow, and pressure.

- [Learning+: Process Control Instrumentation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/process-control-instrumentation.html) : This course provides an overview of the principles and proper use of electrical, electronic, and mechanical test instruments.

- [Learning+: Field Devices](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/field-devices.html) : This course focuses on the operation, maintenance, and repair of oil and gas ignition systems, pulverizers, and coal feeders commonly used in power generation.

- [Continuous Emission Monitoring (CEM) Systems](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/continuous-emission-monitoring--cem--systems.html) : This course will introduce the student to the skills necessary to operate and maintain CEMS and troubleshoot common issues.

- [Bailey Pneumatic Meters and Controls](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/bailey-pneumatic-meters-and-controls.html) : This course provides students the opportunity to develop the knowledge and skills necessary to remove and calibrate meters, operate Standatrol systems, and understand the function of Bailey pneumatic drives and positioners.

- [Learning+: Fire Protection Instrumentation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/fire-protection-instrumentation.html) : In this course, will cover instrumentation used in fire protection systems and how to troubleshoot and repair that instrumentation.

- [Centrifugal Pump Maintenance](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/centrifugal-pump-maintenance.html) : This course provides introduction to different types of centrifugal pumps and their characteristics, centrifigual pump components and operation, and how to perform maintenance procedures.

- [Learning+: Bearing Maintenance and Lubrication](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/bearing-maintenance-and-lubrication.html) : Learn about bearing maintenance and lubrication, including types, installation, and preventive measures for optimal performance.

- [Learning+: Pedestal Grinder](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/pedestal-grinder.html) : In this course the procedure for dressing and truing a grinding wheel on a pedestal grinder is covered.

- [Learning+: Surface Grinder](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/surface-grinder.html) : In this course the proper use of a surface grinder is covered.

- [Band Saw](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/band-saw.html) : In this course the proper procedure to saw to layout lines using a band saw is covered.

- [Learning+: Piping](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/piping.html) : This course covers the fundamentals of piping and instrumentation drawings, including the identification of commonly used symbols and interpretation of drawings.

- [Learning+: Gaskets and O-Rings](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/gaskets-and-o-rings.html) : This course provides the concepts to create and install sealing mediums effectively and efficiently.

- [Learning+: Heat Exchangers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/heat-exchangers.html) : In this course, the fundamental concepts of heat transfer and the various types of heat exchangers commonly used in industrial settings will be presented.

- [Learning+: Coupling and Shaft Alignment](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/coupling-and-shaft-alignment.html) : Discover essential shaft alignment techniques in our e-learning course for mechanical maintenance technicians. Optimize machinery performance. Enroll today.

- [Learning+: Precision Measurement](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/precision-measurement.html) : This course covers the tools and techniques used for precision measurement in industrial settings.

- [Learning+: Conveyor Belt Maintenance](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/conveyor-belt-maintenance.html) : This course provides learners with an introduction to conveyor systems, their components, and their maintenance and repair requirements.

- [Learning+: Valve Maintenance](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/valve-maintenance.html) : This course provides information on valves and their components, as well as the skills and knowledge required for valve maintenance and repair.

- [Learning+: Positive Displacement Pump Maintenance](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/positive-displacement-pump-maintenance.html) : This course provides information on positive displacement pumps and their operation including how to identify the various types of positive displacement pumps and their applications.

- [Learning+: Drill Press](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/drill-press.html) : This course provides instruction on how to operate a drill press effectively and safely.

- [Air Compressor Maintenance](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/air-compressor-maintenance.html) : This course will explore the basic operational theory and classifications of commonly used air compressors.

- [Learning+: Fluid Power (Hydraulics)](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/fluid-power--hydraulics-.html) : This course introduces hydraulic principles and their application in fluid power systems.

- [Learning+: Layout/Bench Work](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/layout-bench-work.html) : This course covers basic metalworking techniques used to shape and modify metal workpieces.

- [Learning+: Lathes](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/lathes.html) : This course provides instruction on the use of a lathe for turning and shaping metal workpieces, including how to use various cutting tools and grinders to produce precise shapes and finishes.

- [Learning+: Vertical Milling Machine](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/vertical-milling-machine.html) : This course introduces the student to the basic operations and functions of a vertical milling machine.

- [Learning+: Welding](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/welding.html) : This course explores the various welding and cutting techniques used in metal fabrication.

- [Learning+: Lubrication Maintenance and Oil Analysis](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/lubrication-maintenance-and-oil-analysis.html) : This course provides information on the importance of proper lubrication in machinery and equipment, including selection, sampling, maintenance, and testing.

- [Learning+: Laser Aided Shaft Alignment](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/laser-aided-shaft-alignment.html) : This course introduces the principles and practices of shaft alignment procedures using laser-based system as well as the basic terminology and theories of shaft alignment.

- [Learning+: Hand Tools](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/hand-tools.html) : Learn essential hand, power, and measuring tool skills safely in industrial settings. Perfect for maintenance. Contact us to enroll.

- [Learning+: Physical Properties](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/physical-properties.html) : This course covers the fundamentals of units of measurement and their applications, with a focus on pressure and its measurement in power plants.

- [Learning+: Interpret CIP Security in the Industrial Automation Space](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/understand-cip-security-in-the-industrial-automation-space.html) : Gain a comprehensive understanding of CIP Security for OT networks in this course. Enhance skills with Rockwell Automation devices.

- [Level 1: FactoryTalk Optix Basic Configuration and Deployment | FactoryTalk | US](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/configure-and-deploy-a-basic-factorytalk-optix-project.html) : Master FactoryTalk Optix Studio with our 6-hour e-learning course. Gain hands-on experience in configuring projects, security, and alarms. Enroll today.

- [Learning+: PowerFlex 755TS Configuration and Startup DRV200-EL](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/powerflex-755ts-configuration-and-startup-drv200-el.html) : Gain expertise in configuring and starting PowerFlex 755TS drives with our in-depth e-learning course. Master control algorithms and optimize drive performance.

- [| Arena Simulation Software | US](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/are-100-arena-simulation-e-learning.html) : Master Arena simulation software with ARE-100, a 20-hour e-learning course. Gain skills in model building and simulation project management. Enroll today.

- [| FactoryTalk | US](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/factorytalk-view-me-and-panelview-plus-maintenance-and-troublesh.html) : Gain essential skills to maintain and troubleshoot FactoryTalk View ME on PanelView Plus 7 terminals. Enroll for expert-led e-learning and HMI proficiency.

- [Building a Batch Application using FactoryTalk Batch Equipment and Recipe Editors | FactoryTalk | US](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/building-a-batch-application-using-factorytalk-batch-equipment-and-recipe-editors-prc111-el.html) : This course provides the fundamental skills required to design and implement a batch project using FactoryTalk Batch software.

- [FactoryTalk Communication with Digital Certificates | FactoryTalk | US](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/learning-plus/factorytalk-communication-digital-certificates.html) : The focus of this course is the topic of digital certificates and deploying a digital certificate within a FactoryTalk® View Site Edition application.

## Instructor-led Courses Catalog

- [Studio 5000 Logix Designer Level 4: Kinetix 5700 (CIP) Programming](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/studio-5000-logix-designer-lvl-4-kinetix-5700-ccn144a.html) : Upon completion of this course, you should be able to configure, test, tune, and program CIP Motion™ axes using the Studio 5000 Logix Designer® application.

- [Safety Relays and Devices Maintenance and Troubleshooting](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/safety-relays-devices-maint-trblsht-saf-com101.html) : Maintain and troubleshoot safety relays and devices efficiently with hands-on training. Gain practical skills for functional safety systems.

- [GuardLogix Application Development and Troubleshooting](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/guardlgx-application-dev-trblsht-saf-log104.html) : This course covers creating a Studio 5000 Logix Designer® project for a GuardLogix® system and troubleshooting a previously operational system.

- [Functional Safety for Machinery Technician Certification (TÜV Rheinland)](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/functional-safety-machinery-tech-cert-saf-tuv0t.html) : This course covers current standards for the selection, assembly, installation, validation, and maintenance of safety devices.

- [Functional Safety For Machinery Introduction](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/functional-safety-machinery-intro-saf-tuv1.html) : This course covers the design and proof requirements for functional safety of machines, according to current standards and guidelines.

- [Functional Safety for Machinery Engineer Certification (TÜV Rheinland)](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/functional-safety-machinery-engineer-cert-saf-tuv2t.html) : This course covers the IEC 60204-1, IEC 62061, ISO 12100, ISO 13849-1, -2, and other relevant machine functional safety standards.

- [PowerFlex 700 Vector Control Communications over EtherNet/IP](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/pflex-700-vector-ctrl-comm-enet-cca165.html) : This course covers adding a PowerFlex® 700 vector control drive to an EtherNet/IP™ network in a Studio 5000 Logix Designer® project.

- [PowerFlex 400 AC Drive Field Startup for HVAC Applications](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/pflex-400-ac-drive-field-startup-cca171-ld.html) : This course covers recognizing PowerFlex® 400 drive hardware, and programming and troubleshooting the drive as part of a typical startup service.

- [PowerFlex 750-Series Configuration and Startup](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/pflex-750-config-startup-cca182.html) : This course covers how to install a PowerFlex® 750-Series drive, start up a drive, and configure drive parameters to meet application-specific needs.

- [PowerFlex 750-Series Maintenance and Troubleshooting](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/pflex-750-maintain-trblshtshoot-cca183.html) : This course covers how to maintain and troubleshoot a PowerFlex® 750-Series (PowerFlex 753 or PowerFlex 755) drive.

- [IntelliCENTER and DeviceNet Configuration](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/intellicenter-dnet-config-cci106-ld.html) : This course covers how to design, specify, install, troubleshoot, and use an IntelliCENTER® MCC or DeviceNet® Motor™ Control Center (MCC).

- [CenterLine MCC With IntelliCENTER Software Commissioning on an EtherNet/IP Network](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/centerline-mcc-intellicenter-comm-enet-cci108.html) : This course covers hardware and software tools for commissioning a CENTERLINE® MCC with IntelliCENTER® software over an EtherNet/IP™ network.

- [Motion Control Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/motion-ctrl-fund-ccn130.html) : This course is designed to provide you with an understanding of concepts, terminology, functionality, and applications of motion control.

- [Motion Control Fundamentals Using Kinetix 5700 (CIP) Servo Drives](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/motion-ctrl-fund-kinetix-5700-ccn132.html) : This course provides you with an understanding of the concepts, terminology, functionality and applications of motion control.

- [Studio 5000 Logix Designer Level 4: Kinetix 6500 (CIP) Programming](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/studio-5000-logix-designer-lvl-4-kinetix-6500-ccn144.html) : This course covers how to configure, test, tune, and program CIP motion axes in the Studio 5000 Logix Designer® programming environment.

- [Studio 5000 Logix Designer Level 3: Basic Ladder Logic Interpretation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/studio-5000-logix-designer-lvl-3-basic-ladder-logic-cccl21.html) : This course provides the resources required to interpret ladder logic instructions for any Logix 5000® controller.

- [Studio 5000 Logix Designer Level 4: Kinetix 6000 (SERCOS) Programming](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/studio-5000-logix-designer-lvl-4-kinetix-6000-ccn145.html) : This course covers how to configure, test, tune, and program SERCOS motion axes in the Studio 5000 Logix Designer® programming environment.

- [Studio 5000 Logix Designer Level 5: Advanced Motion Programming](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/studio-5000-logix-designer-lvl-4-advanced-motion-ccn190-ld.html) : This course covers programming Logix 5000® motion control systems using ladder logic and SERCOS motion control technology.

- [Kinetix 5700 Troubleshooting and Project Interpretation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/kinetix-5700-trblshtshoot-proj-interp-ccn202.html) : This course provides maintenance and troubleshooting methods to diagnose and correct issues that may occur with a Kinetix® 5700 servo drive system.

- [PowerFlex 755T Maintenance and Troubleshooting](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/pflex-755t-maintain-trblshoot-cca255-ld.html) : This course covers the techniques for facilitating operation, maintenance, and troubleshooting of PowerFlex 755TL, 755TR, and 755TM drives.

- [PID Loop Development and Tuning](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/pid-loop-dev-tuning-prs010.html) : This course covers the skills needed to obtain a tuned process control loop for typical applications.

- [Pulp and Paper Application Suite Configuration](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/pulp-paper-app-suite-config-prs017.html) : This course covers how to maintain and troubleshoot PlantPAx process automation systems for pulp and paper industry and applications.

- [FactoryTalk Historian Site Edition Configuration and Data Collection](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/ftalk-historian-se-config-data-collection-rs-fthsec.html) : This course covers the various FactoryTalk™ Historian tools for collecting data and how to configure a FactoryTalk Historian Site Edition system.

- [PowerFlex Low Voltage AC Drive Startup for Water/Wastewater](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/pflex-lv-ac-drive-startup-water-wastewater-si-cca176-ld.html) : This course covers recognizing PowerFlex low-voltage drive hardware and how to program and troubleshoot the drive.

- [Basic Electrical Concepts](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/basic-electrical-concepts-ems100.html) : This course covers basic concepts of direct current (DC) electricity and magnetism, including electrostatics, and basic circuit concepts.

- [Motor Theory](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/motor-theory-ems105.html) : This course covers motors and motor components operation principles, and the AC/DC theory of operation, including torque, pullout torque, and slip.

- [Generator Theory](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/generator-theory-ems110.html) : This course covers the concepts associated with generators, generator function, generator design, three-phase voltage, and load sharing.

- [Electrical Test Equipment](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/electrical-test-equipment-ems115.html) : This course covers electrical testing, safety precautions associated with electrical testing, and the use and care of electrical test equipment.

- [Conduit Bending and Wiring](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/conduit-bending-wiring-ems125.html) : This course covers calculating and making conduit bends and the installation and splicing of wiring in accordance with NFPA 70 standards.

- [Power Transformers](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/power-transformers-ems200.html) : This course covers concepts associated with transformer function, design, and inspection and testing in accordance with NFPA NEC 70 standards.

- [Batteries and Uninterruptable Power Supplies](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/batteries-uninterrupt-power-supplies-ems225.html) : This course covers the concepts associated with industrial batteries, Uninterruptable Power Supplies (UPS) and transfer switches.

- [Motor Control and Troubleshooting](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/motor-control-trblsht-ems230.html) : This course covers analyzing and evaluating faults and applying a systematic approach to troubleshooting motor control circuits.

- [SLC 500 and RSLogix 500 Maintenance and Troubleshooting](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/slc-500-rlgix-500-maint-trblsht-ccps43.html) : This course covers interpreting, isolating and diagnosing common hardware problems related to noise, power, and discrete and analog I/O.

- [SLC 500 and RSLogix 500 Programming](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/slc-500-rlgix-500-programming-ccps41.html) : This course covers how to program an SLC™ 500 processor to meet the requirements of a given specification, using RSLogix 500® software.

- [Reciprocating Compressors Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/reciprocating-compressors-fundamentals-mms140.html) : This course provides information on the concepts associated with reciprocating compressors.

- [PlantPax System Design and Configuration](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/plantpax-system-design-config-prc201.html) : This course introduces the core components of a PlantPAx® 5.0 distributed control system, including system architecture, configuration, alarms, and security.

- [Industrial Electrical Controls Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/industrial-electrical-controls-fundamentals-mfg213.html) : This course covers the knowledge and skills required to install, maintain, and troubleshoot machine controls.

- [Basics of Electricity](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/basics-electricity-mfg244.html) : This course covers identifying component operations in energized and deenergized states and safety fundamentals and safe operation awareness.

- [Heat Exchanger Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/heat-exchanger-fundamentals-mms100.html) : This course covers heat transfer methods and basic maintenance and inspection techniques associated with heat exchangers.

- [Valve Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/valve-fundamentals-mms105.html) : This course covers the types of valves and actuator used as control elements, valve components, and valve applications.

- [Valve Repair](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/valve-repair-mms210.html) : This course provides information on valve maintenance and repair activities associated with common valves used in industrial applications.

- [Centrifugal Pumps](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/centrifugal-pumps-mms200.html) : This course covers the concepts associated with centrifugal pump application, operation, hazards, troubleshooting and repair common problems.

- [Positive Displacement Pumps](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/positive-displacement-pumps-mms205.html) : This course covers positive displacement pump application, operation, hazards, troubleshooting and repair common problems.

- [Shaft and Coupling Alignment](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/shaft-coupling-alignment-mms245.html) : This course covers proper alignment and alignment methods, cause of misalignment, and how to correct errors using dial indicators.

- [Pipefitting](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/pipefitting-mms250.html) : This course covers codes and standards, types of piping and associated components, specifications, and fitting and supporting techniques.

- [Seals and Packing Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/seals-packing-fundamentals-mms110.html) : This course provides information on identification and installation of packing and mechanical seals and their applications.

- [Bearing Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/bearing-fundamentals-mms115.html) : This course provides information on identification, maintenance, and installation of bearings and their applications.

- [Boiler Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/boiler-fundamentals-mms120.html) : This course provides information on the fundamentals of boiler construction and operation.

- [Hydraulics and Pneumatics Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/hydraulics-pneumatics-fundamentals-mms125.html) : This course covers hydraulics, hydraulic systems and components, fluid principles, hydraulic system design, and hydraulic schematic symbology.

- [Diesel Engine Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/diesel-engines-fundamentals-mms135.html) : This course covers the major components and operation of a diesel engine.

- [Axial Flow Compressors Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/axial-flow-fundamentals-mms145.html) : This course provides information on the concepts associated with axial flow compressors.

- [Radial Flow Compressors Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/radial-flow-compressors-fundamentals-mms150.html) : This course provides information on the concepts associated with Radial Flow compressors.

- [Belt Drives](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/belt-drives-mms225.html) : This course covers belt drives, belt drive function, belt drive design, belt drive maintenance, installation and removal and belt drive faults.

- [Chain Drives](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/chain-drives-mms230.html) : This course covers chain drives, chain drive function, chain drive design, chain drive maintenance, installation, removal, and chain drive faults.

- [Gears](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/gears-mms235.html) : This course provides information on the concepts associated with gears, gear function, gear backlash, gear lubrication, and gear ratios.

- [Bolts and Fasteners](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/bolts-fasteners-mus100.html) : This course covers threaded and bolted fasteners and the specifications for fasteners and the assembly of equipment using fasteners.

- [Precision Measuring Instruments](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/precision-measuring-instruments-mus105.html) : This course provides information on the proper use of measuring tools to make basic linear and angular measurements.

- [Rigging](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/rigging-mus205.html) : This course covers rigging equipment, inspection, planning, and proper selection of rigging equipment in accordance with OSHA part 1910.

- [Lubrication Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/lubrication-fundamentals-mus110.html) : This course provides information on the concepts associated with lubrication, lubrication properties, and lubrication selection.

- [Lubricant Application and Analysis](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/lubricant-application-analysis-mus115.html) : This course provides information on the application types, storage and handling, filtering, determining health, and wear of lubricants.

- [Introduction to Steam Turbines](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/intro-steam-turbines-mus125.html) : This course provides information on the concepts associated with steam turbines.

- [Introduction to Gas Turbines](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/intro-gas-turbines-mus130.html) : This course provides information on the concepts associated with gas turbines.

- [Scaffolding](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/scaffolding-mus200.html) : This course covers safely erecting and dismantling fabricated frame scaffolding in accordance with OSHA part 1910 or part 1926 regulations.

- [Electric Overhead Traveling Crane Inspection](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/electric-overhead-traveling-crane-inspection-mus300.html) : This course covers mechanical inspection of Electrical Overhead Traveling (EOT) cranes in accordance with OSHA part 1910.179 regulations.

- [Direct Current Crane Controls](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/dc-crane-controls-mus305.html) : This course covers DC cranes and the control equipment, interpreting crane control prints, and troubleshooting crane control faults.

- [Mechanical Print Reading](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/mechanical-print-reading-fnd015.html) : This course provides an understanding of information found on mechanical drawings and prints.

- [Mechanical Safety and Lockout Tagout](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/mechanical-safety-lockout-tagout-fnd020.html) : This course provides information on potential safety hazards, safety precautions, personal protective equipment, and lockout/tagout per OSHA regulations.

- [Electrical Print Reading](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/electrical-print-reading-fnd030.html) : This course provides the participant with the basic understanding of electrical prints and components associated with electrical print reading

- [Electrical Safety for Qualified Personnel](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/electrical-safety-for-qualified-personnel-fnd035.html) : This electrical safety course covers electrical safety including LOTO and Arc Flash that meets the training requirements per OSHA regulations.

- [Industrial Electronics](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/industrial-electronics-ics100.html) : This course provides information on the function and circuit analysis of power supplies, amplifiers, integrators, comparators, and oscillators.

- [Basic Digital Circuits](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/digital-circuits-ics105.html) : This course provides information on the basic digital electronics concepts, gates, circuits, flip-flop based circuits, and troubleshooting techniques.

- [Instrumentation Overview](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/instrumentation-overview-ics110.html) : This course provides information on the components, function and design of instrumentation loops.

- [Introduction to HART Communications](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/intro-to-hart-communications-ics115.html) : This course provides information on the components, function and design of instrumentation loops for HART communication protocols.

- [Combustion Basics](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/combustion-basics-ics120.html) : This course explains the theory, function, design, methods of heat transfer and safety issues when working on or maintaining combustion equipment.

- [Introduction to Distributed Control Systems](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/introduction-to-distributed-control-systems-ics125.html) : This course provides information on the components, infrastructure, networking and communication protocols of Distributed Control Systems (DCS).

- [Process Controls Fundamentals](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/process-controls-fundamentals-ics200.html) : This course provides information on the fundamentals of process control and PID loop tuning.

- [Differential Pressure Cells](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/differential-pressure-cells-ics300.html) : This course provides information on how differential pressure cells function and their uses in a process control environment.

- [Level Detection](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/level-detection-ics305.html) : This course provides information on how different level detectors function and their uses in a process control environment.

- [Flow Detection](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/flow-detection-ics310.html) : This course provides information on how different flow detectors function and their uses in a process control environment.

- [Temperature Detection](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/temperature-detection-ics315.html) : This course provides information on how different temperature detectors function and their uses in a process control environment.

- [FactoryTalk Optix Basic Configuration and Deployment Level 1 | FactoryTalk | US](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/factorytalk-optix-basic-configuration-and-deployment-lvl-1-vis150.html) : This course is designed to provide basic knowledge of the terminology, functions, and features of FactoryTalk Optix Studio software.

- [PowerFlex 750-Series Configuration, Startup, Maintenance, and Troubleshooting](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/support/workforce-development-training/instructor-led/pflex-750-config-maintain-drv215.html) : This course covers the installation, startup, configuration, maintenance, and troubleshooting of PowerFlex 750-Series drive.

## Legal Notices Catalog

- [Accessibility](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/accessibility.html) : Learn about the Accessibility for Ontarians with Disability Act Policy statement.

- [Terms of Purchase](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/terms-of-purchase.html) : Rockwell Automation objects to any vendor web-based terms of sales, including those that may require "click-through" acceptance, when effecting an internet-based purchase.

- [Trademarks](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/trademarks.html) : This list is a subset of trademarks owned and used by Rockwell Automation and its various subsidiary entities.

- [Privacy and Cookies Policy](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/privacy-and-cookies-policy.html) : Rockwell Automation Inc. and its subsidiaries respect and are committed to protecting your privacy.

- [Terms and Conditions of Sale](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/terms-and-conditions-of-sale.html) : These general terms and conditions of sale only apply to purchases of Allen‑Bradley and Rockwell Software branded products and related services made directly from Rockwell Automation.

- [Terms and Conditions of Technical Sales Support Services](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/terms-and-conditions-of-technical-sales-support-services.html) : Ensure seamless technical sales support with Rockwell Automation's expert services, prioritizing security and collaboration for enhanced customer satisfaction.

- [Terms and Conditions of Access](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/terms-and-conditions-of-access.html) : The terms of a legal agreement between any user of this website and Rockwell Automation, Inc. and its subsidiaries.

Contact us for updates and ensure supply chain continuity.

- [Rockwell Automation is an Equal Opportunity/Non-Discrimination Employer](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/equal-opportunity-affirmative-action-employer.html) : Rockwell Automation is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to fostering an inclusive workplace.

Stay secure with industry-leading TOMS. Learn more.

- [SI Program Participation Agreement](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/system-integrator-agreement.html) : Join Rockwell Automation's System Integrator Program to access exclusive tools and resources for enhanced solution development and a strengthened partnership.

- [OEM Partner Program Participation Agreement](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/oem-partner-agreement.html) : Join Rockwell Automation's OEM Partner Program to access exclusive benefits, enhance your training, and optimize your business with our support. Explore now.

- [Prohibited Technologies Statement](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/prohibited-technologies-statement.html) : Rockwell Automation’s compliance with certain Federal Acquisition Regulations regarding prohibited technologies.

- [EPC Mutual Non Disclosure Agreement](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/epc-mutual-non-disclosure-agreement.html) : Secure your sensitive business discussions with our Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement. Protect confidential information and ensure compliance.

- [Build America, Buy America (BABA) Compliance](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/build-america-buy-america-compliance.html) : Ensure compliance with Build America, Buy America (BABA) with Rockwell Automation's U.S.-manufactured products. Explore our expanding portfolio.

- [Professional Services and Deliverables Agreement](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/company/about-us/legal-notices/professional-services-and-deliverables-agreement.html) : This agreement between Rockwell Automation and Customer covers the performance and sale of the Deliverables set forth in Rockwell Automation’s Statement of Work.

## Tools Catalog

- [Advisor](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/tools/advisor.html) : Advisor lets you configure a customized MCC or VFD and quickly obtain a rough cost, submit for a quote, or customize the proposed solution.

- [Drive Comparison Calculator](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/tools/drive-comparison-calculator.html) : Low voltage drives energy efficiency comparison calculator.

- [Drives Efficiency Calculator](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/tools/drive-efficiency-calculator.html) : The Drives Efficiency Calculator will calculate power losses for your Allen Bradley drive, ensuring it meets the IEC 61800-9-2 standard.

- [MyRockwellAutomation](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/tools/myrockwellautomation.html) : Experience myRockwellAutomation, your digital hub for Rockwell products and services. Streamlined features for convenience. Boost productivity now!

- [My Equipment](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/tools/my-equipment.html) : Optimize your asset management with My Equipment, providing actionable insights to reduce costs and downtime. Enhance decision-making today. Contact us now.

- [Sustainability Calculator for Repairs](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/tools/sustainability-calculator-for-repairs.html) : Measure sustainability and visualize the environmental impact of your repairs. Calculator is included with Repair+, Inventory+ or Asset+ Managed service.

- [Software Subscriptions](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/tools/software-subscriptions-updated.html) : Discover FactoryTalk DesignSuite to streamline machine development across industries. Save time and reduce costs with efficient software tools and resources.

- [Variable Frequency Drive Energy Savings Calculator](https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/tools/variable-frequency-drive-energy-savings-calculator.html) : Consult Rockwell Automation experts to optimize your automation investment with tailored design, implementation, and support.
